Although she technically belongs to C&C, she's been Rio's exclusive maid and bodyguard for some time, so few know who Toki is. While she is a superior secret agent who's at ease with high-tech weaponry and technology, she seems to be a bit lonely as she always works solo.

Ex.Name: System: Abi-Eshuh
Ex.Desc: Toki engages , increasing her by , by and by 12.2% and immediately reloading. While in , changes Toki's EX and Basic Skill and pattern. Ends after 3 EX Skill uses.

ExtraSkills.Name: System: Abi-Eshuh
ExtraSkills.Desc: Fires 3 lasers towards the targeted enemy. The first and second lasers deal <?1> damage to enemies in a straight line towards the target, the third laser deals <?2> damage to the targeted enemy and <?3> damage to other enemies in a straight line range. This attack ignores <?4> of the enemy's DEF.

Public.Name: Tactical Decision
Public.Desc: Every 35s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy.

ExtraSkills.Name: Tactical Decision
ExtraSkills.Desc: Every 35s while in <s:CH0187Mod>, deals <?1> damage to one enemy. This attack will ignore <?2> of the enemy's DEF.

GearPublic.Name: Tactical Decision+
GearPublic.Desc:
When <s:CH0187Mod> ends or every 35s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy.
Grants <s:ExSkillCardRedrawStackDummy>, immediately redrawing the EX Skill after the next use.

ExtraSkills.Name: Tactical Decision+
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Upon engaging <s:CH0187Mod>, and every 35s after, deals <?1> damage to one enemy. This attack will ignore <?2> of the enemy's DEF.
Also increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?3> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Eye for an Eye
ExtraPassive.Desc: While in , Toki's EX Skill deals // damage as an additional hit for the 1st/2nd/3rd use of the skill (count resets when Abi-Eshuh mode ends). This additional damage ignores of the enemy's DEF.

Weapon.Name: Time of Secrecy
Weapon.Desc:
Toki's one-of-a-kind assault rifle.

With performance as exceptional as its appearance suggests, it can crush any obstacle and complete any mission. She didn't name it herself, but it's unknown who did.

Gear.Name: High-Performance Headset
Gear.Desc:
The perfect headset for maids and agents. It's noise-cancelling and has special technology for processing audio. It's even hackproof!
For Toki, it's an item that represents her relationship with someone very precious to her.

20024.Name: Nagisa
20024.CharacterSSRNew: And how are you? Greetings from Trinity.
20024.ProfileIntroduction:
The leader of Filius, one of the allied factions that makes up Trinity General School, and the host of the Tea Party.

Although she has a sweet and friendly demeanor, she rarely reveals her true feelings, so she's not very approachable. Her hobby is preparing tea and refreshments for tea parties. Many Trinity students long to attend her get-togethers.
20024.Hobby: Collecting tea leaves, baking pastries, gardening

Ex.Name: Time On Target
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to enemies in a circular area. Also decreases the of Light Armor enemies before the attack hits by for 15s.

Public.Name: Afternoon Tea
Public.Desc: Every 50s, restores the HP of the ally with the lowest HP by of Healing. If the target is from Trinity General School, restores their HP by of Healing instead.

ExtraPassive.Name: Noblesse Oblige
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases the of all allies who use Explosive type attacks by .

Weapon.Name: Royal Blend
Weapon.Desc:
Nagisa's favorite small pistol.

Its classic design fits the appearance of a host at elegant tea parties. It's essential for chasing away uninvited guests who demean the dignity of tea parties.

10063.Name: Koyuki
10063.CharacterSSRNew: When the plan falls apart, well... That's when life gets interesting!
10063.ProfileIntroduction:
A brilliant yet troublesome member of Millennium's Seminar.

She's completely unaware of her unrivaled talent for mathematical decryption. She always sets out to test her luck. Even if she goes too far and lands in hot water, she never stops.

Ex.Name: Unexpected Variable
Ex.Desc: Randomly throws one of three bombs that deal a different amount of damage to enemies in a circular area, depending on the bomb chosen. Bullet Bomb: damage. Electric Field Bomb: damage. Explosive Bomb: damage.

Public.Name: One? Or Two?!
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy that bounces and deals the same damage to up to two nearby enemies. Koyuki reloads immediately after activation.

GearPublic.Name: One? Or Two?!+
GearPublic.Desc: Every 30s, deals damage to one enemy that bounces and deals the same damage to up to two nearby enemies. Koyuki reloads immediately after activation. Whenever a total of 6 enemies are defeated by this skill, reduces own by 3 (for 1 EX Skill use).

ExtraPassive.Name: Butterfly Effect
ExtraPassive.Desc: When Koyuki activates her EX Skill, increases her by a different amount depending on the bomb chosen. Bullet Bomb: for 40s. Electric Field Bomb: for 40s. Explosive Bomb: for 40s.

Weapon.Name: Mulli-Gun
Weapon.Desc:
A machine gun that's been through the wringer alongside Koyuki.

Once, it was entirely submerged in seawater. During the repair process, its color changed. Other than that, it's still as sturdy as Koyuki, who never worries about such trivialities.

Gear.Name: Challenge Coin
Gear.Desc: A coin that Koyuki drilled a hole in. It was originally made so that she could play arcade machines for free, but it's now useless because of modern card readers.

10064.Name: Kayoko (New Year)
10064.CharacterSSRNew: I hope I find some good music this year.
10064.ProfileIntroduction:
Problem Solver 68's department head.

She dressed up for New Year's with the other members, and it's like she was born to wear the dress! She's obviously annoyed by all the commotion at the New Year's Eve event, but she'll always do her best to help out Problem Solver 68 with her brains and wit.

Ex.Name: New Year's Amulet
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:EnhanceMysticRate> of one ally except self by <?1> for 40s and grants them the <s:Omamori> status effect.

Public.Name: Kitty Cat Time
Public.Desc: Every 40s, increases the <b:CriticalChance> of one ally except self by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Reciprocal Relationship
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Every 200 times a critical hit is landed by allies, increases own <b:ATK> by <?1> and increases the <b:EnhanceMysticRate> of all allies with the <s:Omamori> status by <?2> for 50s.
(The <s:Omamori> status is removed from all allies after activation)

Weapon.Name: Demon's Roar
Weapon.Desc:
Kayoko always has this pistol by her side.

This pistol emits a tremendous roar with every shot. It's useful for not only taking care of rude clients, but also for chasing away bad luck in the new year.

20025.Name: Haruka (New Year)
20025.CharacterSSRNew: This year... I-I'm gonna work like there's no tomorrow...!
20025.ProfileIntroduction:
An employee of Problem Solver 68.

She's excited to welcome the new year with those most important to her. She went out of her comfort zone dressing up so she could fit in with her other club members on this special occasion.

Ex.Name: Who Approved This...?!
Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:CriticalChanceResistPoint> and <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 50s, and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: A Proper Greeting
Public.Desc: Every 30s, decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 20s.

ExtraPassive.Name: All Her Courage
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CostRegen> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Blow Away
Weapon.Desc:
A shotgun Haruka uses to exterminate any "pests" that stand in her way.

She also uses it to exterminate real pests.

10065.Name: Kaho
10065.CharacterSSRNew: Allow me to show you Hyakkiyako's impeccable charm, Sensei.
10065.ProfileIntroduction: Vice President of the Hyakkiyako Academy and the Lead Strategist for the Tourism and Culture Public Relations Support Team.A member of the Yin-Yang Club, she is in charge of Hyakkiyako's public relations and marketing. So, naturally, she's an avid fan of all things Hyakkiyako and cares deeply about the students who work together to build the culture she loves. Some students even whisper that Kaho feels more like the president than their actual president. In a pool of eccentric Yin-Yang Club members, she's the only one with a healthy amount of common sense, and that alone makes her an invaluable part of the team.

Ex.Name: Fanatical Behavior
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy.

Public.Name: Disciplined Preparation
Public.Desc: Every 50s, gains the effect of <s:Dado> and increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for <?2>.

GearPublic.Name: Disciplined Preparation+
GearPublic.Desc: At the start of battle and every 50s after, gains the effect of <s:Dado> and increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for <?2>.

ExtraPassive.Name: Serene Relaxation
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals <?1> damage as an additional hit while under the effect of <s:Dado>.

Weapon.Name: The Lead Strategist's Expertise
Weapon.Desc:
Kaho is never seen without her rifle.

This rifle was custom designed with one purpose in mind: promoting Hyakkiyako's unique style and culture. Although it's made for publicity, it still packs a punch when putting troublemakers back in line.

Gear.Name: Students' Certificate of Appreciation
Gear.Desc: A certificate of appreciation from Hyakkiyako students, presented to Kaho and carefully preserved in a frame.

10066.Name: Aris (Maid)
10066.CharacterSSRNew: Bum bum bum! I am now Aris the hero, maid edition!
10066.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Millennium Game Development Department. She's wearing a maid uniform after being mistaken for a C&C member.

The maid uniform is a little different from what she'd usually wear, but she's determined to get used to it. A bright and cheerful honorary maid, Aris gives everything she has to complete her assigned missions.

Ex.Name: Aris, Clean Up!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy.

Public.Name: Earnest Handiwork
Public.Desc: Every 15 normal attacks, increases <b:EnhanceMysticRate> by <?1> and <b:ATK> by <?2> for <?3>.

GearPublic.Name: Earnest Handiwork+
GearPublic.Desc: Every 15 normal attacks, increases <b:EnhanceMysticRate> by <?1>, <b:ATK> by <?2> and <b:CriticalChance> by <?3> for <?4>.

ExtraPassive.Name: Class Change: Hero Maid!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Aris' normal attack changes to damage one enemy and deals <?1> damage as an additional hit.

Weapon.Name: Supernova: The Sword of Light
Weapon.Desc:
Aris' railgun.

She takes advantage of its sheer output and firepower to snipe any enemy that stands in her way. She has one mission in mind: to utterly crush her target!

Gear.Name: Maid Headband
Gear.Desc: It seems that a mop, a maid uniform, and a maid headband are the three marks of a Hero Maid. Of these, Aris considers the headband the most essential.

10067.Name: Toki (Bunny)
10067.CharacterSSRNew: I am ready to commence operation at anytime. ...Is there a problem with my outfit?
10067.ProfileIntroduction:
A dedicated C&C agent, Toki changed into a bunny costume to better camouflage her in infiltration operations.

Her specialty under Rio was never infiltrations, so she's a little nervous about these new types of missions. But regardless, she's excited to finally follow in the footsteps of her C&C upperclassmen, no matter how much she tries to hide it.

Ex.Name: Special Weapon: Gauntlet
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy.

Public.Name: Covert Agent Tool
Public.Desc: Every 40s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy and decreases their <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> by <?2> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Weapon Mastery
ExtraPassive.Desc: Whenever Toki uses her EX skill, increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1> for 20s.

Weapon.Name: Time of Secrecy
Weapon.Desc:
Toki's exclusive assault rifle.

Whether it's a standard mission or a top-secret operation, she'll dominate the field with her weapon.

26009.Name: Yuzu (Maid)
26009.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Millennium Game Development Department. She began wearing a maid uniform after being mistaken for a C&C member.

The new outfit might not have transformed her into an outgoing extrovert, but it did give her the confidence to leave her room! With scary and unfamiliar events occurring all around her, Yuzu does her best to overcome each obstacle with the Game Development Department's support.

Ex.Name: Infiltration, Start!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area and then deals the same damage to enemies in a surrounding donut-shaped area. Enemies that overlap both areas only receive <?2> damage on the second hit.

Public.Name: High Score Combo
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

ExtraPassive.Name: Game Developers' Bond
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Nyan's Dash
Weapon.Desc:
Yuzu's grenade launcher.

It had to be designed to be able to fire grenades under any circumstances, considering her habit of trying to fight from the safety of her box.

10068.Name: Reisa
10068.CharacterSSRNew: The ace, hero, arbitrator, knight, and star. I am...Uzawa Reisa!
10068.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Vigilante Crew who tends to show up suddenly and unannounced.

Reisa is rambunctious and loud, so much so that she's often taken for a joke. But there's no one more passionate about Vigilante Crew activities than she is. She likes to make an entrance when she bursts on to the scene, and is always testing out different heroic introductions.

Ex.Name: Duel Me!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Removes one debuff from self.

Public.Name: Victory Pose!
Public.Desc: Every 50s, gains <b:DotHeal>, continuously restoring HP equal to <?1> of Healing every 4s for 30s.

Passive.Name: I Can Do This All Day

WeaponPassive.Name: I Can Do This All Day+
WeaponPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> by <?1> plus a further <?3> and <b:MAXHP> by <?2> plus a further <?4>.

ExtraPassive.Name: The Reisa Effect
ExtraPassive.Desc: Reisa's EX skill also decreases the <d:DEF> of enemies hit by <?1> for 25s and inflicts <c:Provoke> for 1s.

Weapon.Name: Shooting☆Star
Weapon.Desc:
Reisa's precious shotgun.

It's immediately obvious whose weapon this is with the carefully customized gun barrel. She may be small and cute, but her experience defending justice in Trinity makes her just as fierce!

10069.Name: Rumi
10069.ProfileIntroduction:
President of the Black Tortoise Promenade, a food district in Shanhaijing Academy.

Possessing exceptional operational skills, Rumi has grown the Black Tortoise Promenade from a run-of-the-mill food alley into one of the most sought-after food districts in Kivotos. This has made her a thorn in the side of the Shanhaijing Student Council, who is wary of the growth of independent factions. Rumi denies this and claims she isn't interested in anything other than cooking and advancing the promenade.

Ex.Name: World's Tastiest!
Ex.Desc: Throws fried rice to one ally except self, restoring their HP. The fried rice can bounce and restore the HP of additional allies (including self) who have not yet received it, up to 4 times. 1st & 4th targets: Restores HP equal to of Healing. 2nd & 3rd targets: Restores HP equal to of Healing.

Public.Name: Business Safety Regulations
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area.

WeaponPassive.Name: Merchant Guild President's Pride+
WeaponPassive.Desc: Increases by 100 and by plus a further .

ExtraPassive.Name: Memorable Taste
ExtraPassive.Desc: Grants <b:DotHeal> to allies healed by Rumi's EX skill, continuously restoring HP equal to <?1> of Healing every 4s for 60s.

Weapon.Name: Learn the Old, Know the New
Weapon.Desc:
Rumi's favorite submachine gun.

Named after an old idiom that goes, "learn from the old to know the new." Rumi has always seemed more interested in the "new" aspect.

10070.Name: Mina
10070.CharacterSSRNew:
One must fight their own battles.
No good comes from involving others.
10070.ProfileIntroduction:
Executive Officer of Genryumon, Shanhaijing's student council, and the Student Council President's personal bodyguard.

Despite her calm and collected demeanor, she's a hardcore classic noir movie buff. She likes to quote scenes and lines from movies, although often incorrectly. She gets into trouble trying to be cool at inappropriate times, but Genryumon members do their best to mitigate the damage.

Ex.Name: Well Matched
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy and decreases their <d:ATK><?2> by <?3> for 50s.

Public.Name: Unstoppable
Public.Desc: Every 8 normal attacks, immediately reloads and deals damage to one enemy. Deals additional damage depending on the number of debuffs inflicted on the target. 3 debuffs: damage. 4 debuffs: damage. 5 or more debuffs: damage.

ExtraPassive.Name: Determination
ExtraPassive.Desc: Whenever Mina uses her EX skill, increases <b:ATK>, <b:Dodge> and <b:HIT> by <?1> for 20s.

Weapon.Name: Wise Dragon, White Tiger
Weapon.Desc:
Mina's beloved two-handed pistols.

The White Tiger in her right hand and the Wise Dragon in her left, she affectionally calls these two her true comrades-in-arms. Perhaps emotion and reason can work in tandem at times.

20026.Name: Minori
20026.CharacterSSRNew:
All the pudding in Kivotos for the students
who fight the good fight!
20026.ProfileIntroduction:
Head of Red Winter Federal Academy's Labor Party.

She dispatches and manages laborers wherever they are needed, including large-scale construction sites. Despite her ability to get any job done, she has a bad reputation with employers due to being prone to leading strikes and protests at the slightest hint of trouble.

Ex.Name: Onward and Onward!
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to enemies in a circular area. Consumes up to 3 additional units of skill cost, increasing the damage dealt by 35% for each additional unit of cost consumed. (EX Cost increase/decrease effects will be calculated using the base cost)

Public.Name: United Will
Public.Desc: Every 25s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

ExtraPassive.Name: Fruits of Labor
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Torch of Steel
Weapon.Desc:
Minori's favorite sturdy assault rifle.

As its name suggests, this simple assault rifle has continued to faithfully light up Minori's path of struggle.

10071.Name: Miyako (Swimsuit)
10071.CharacterSSRNew: This is RABBIT 1. We've just arrived at the ocean.
10071.ProfileIntroduction:
The RABBIT Squad leader, who has come to a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

She has come to the seaside town disguised as a tourist to investigate the boxed lunches distributed to convenience stores.
With the hostile reactions from the residents and the fishy smell wafting through town, it's not exactly a tourist's dream. But still, she can't resist dressing for the beach with a cute swimsuit!

Ex.Name: Flying Drone Launch
Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 50s and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: UV Protection
Public.Desc: Every 30s, increases <b:Dodge> by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Tactical Maneuver
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 50 times an attack is successfully evaded, increases <b:CostRegen> by <?1> for 10s.

Weapon.Name: RABBIT Type 31 Submachine Gun
Weapon.Desc:
A submachine gun Miyako received from the SRT Academy.
It's incredibly reliable and can operate effectively in hot and humid environments.

10072.Name: Saki (Swimsuit)
10072.CharacterSSRNew:
This is RABBIT 2.
Commencing undercover operation.
10072.ProfileIntroduction:
The RABBIT Squad's point woman, who is visiting a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

Always focused on doing things by-the-book, Saki has come with a bag packed with everything needed for a mission, including her manuals. Despite being in a swimsuit, her work ethic remains the same.

Ex.Name: Throw Flare!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy and decreases their <d:DEF>, <d:ATK> and <d:CriticalChanceResistPoint> by <?2> for 50s.

Public.Name: Cover Fire
Public.Desc: Every 15 normal attacks, deals damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Deals an additional damage to medium sized enemies.

ExtraPassive.Name: Camaraderie
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> of self and Special students by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: RABBIT Type 26 Machine Gun
Weapon.Desc:
Standard machine gun issued to Saki from SRT Academy.

It frequently malfunctions in humid environments like the beach, because it's vulnerable to rusting. This isn't a problem to Saki though, who diligently cleans her guns with every use.

26010.Name: Miyu (Swimsuit)
26010.ProfileIntroduction:
The RABBIT Squad's sniper, who's visiting a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

She brought her fishing tackle to blend in and spends most of her time at the docks. Occasionally, she catches an unexpected big fish and attracts the attention of other anglers, but...her natural lack of presence remains strong even in this peculiar village.

Ex.Name: Attack of the Seagulls
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> guaranteed critical damage to enemies in a rectangular area.

Public.Name: Secret Strike
Public.Desc: Every 70s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area.

ExtraPassive.Name: Observation Status Report
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: RABBIT Type 39 Rifle
Weapon.Desc:
Standard rifle issued to Miyu from SRT Academy.

The simple yet sturdy construction of the bolt-action allows you to snipe down enemies in harsh sea winds without malfunctioning.

20027.Name: Shiroko (Swimsuit)
20027.CharacterSSRNew: I'm not excited. I'm doing what I have to do.
20027.ProfileIntroduction:
The resident athlete of the Foreclosure Task Force, ready for her summer vacation at a deserted island resort.

Despite the difficulty of the situation, she gives her all to rebuilding the resort and gathering food. Even in a swimsuit meant for play, she doesn't lose her characteristic single-minded drive.

Ex.Name: It's a Big Catch
Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:DEF> of one enemy by <?1> for 30s, and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: "Coincidental"
Public.Desc: At the start of battle, increases the of all allies except self by for 60s, and reduces the for their next EX Skill use by 1. Activates once per battle.

ExtraPassive.Name: Trained Health
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CostRegen> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: White Fang 465
Weapon.Desc:
Shiroko's assault rifle, favored even at sea.

Thanks to the extra care taken on its maintenance, it can handle water and salt.

10073.Name: Ui (Swimsuit)
10073.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Trinity Library Committee. She's investigating the ruins as part of a deal with the Sisterhood.

She doesn't enjoy the outdoors much, but she's taking the investigation seriously, as she has a passion for ancient manuscripts, ruins, and artifacts.

Ex.Name: Desert Island Cafe
Ex.Desc: Repositions up to 4 allies in a circular area to Ui's current location and increases their <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1> for 45s.

Public.Name: Decisive Clue
Public.Desc:
When Ui has 3 <s:OldBook>, increases all Striker allies' <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1> for 30s.
All <s:OldBook> are removed after activation.

ExtraPassive.Name: Clue Uncovered
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 2 times an ally other than Ui uses their EX Skill, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 30s and gain one <s:OldBook='Clue'>.

Weapon.Name: Volume Suppressor
Weapon.Desc:
Ui's silenced rifle.

Even though she's on a deserted island, it's seen quite a bit of use.

20028.Name: Hinata (Swimsuit)
20028.CharacterSSRNew: Is that heavy? Would you like me to carry your bags?
20028.ProfileIntroduction:
A girl from the Sisterhood who came to the island to help investigate the ruins.

Even in this idyllic environment, she has a natural tendency to help everyone around her. Of course, not even Hinata can resist the relaxing effects of the lazy ocean breeze.

Ex.Name: Overflowing Water Barrage
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area. This attack ignores <?2> of the enemy's DEF.

Public.Name: Cool Water Barrage
Public.Desc: Every 40s, Throws a water balloon at an enemy that deals <?1> damage, bouncing to other nearby enemies that have not been hit yet, up to 6 times. This attack ignores <?2> of the enemy's DEF.

ExtraPassive.Name: Helping Hands
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Reverence
Weapon.Desc:
Hinata's pistol never leaves her side, even in the summer heat.

Useful for menial tasks, such as shooting fruit down from high places.

16013.Name: Koharu (Swimsuit)
16013.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Make-Up Work Club who's come to spy on Sensei.

While she feels a sense of duty to keep an eye on things, she's not unhappy that she's basically on vacation.

Ex.Name: Caught Browsing
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: Stimulating Read
Public.Desc: Every 30s, increases <b:CriticalChance> by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Death Penalty for Indecency!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals damage as an additional hit to medium sized enemies.

Weapon.Name: Justice Black
Weapon.Desc:
Koharu's sniper rifle has been modified for an island environment.

It's surprisingly well protected against humidity and salt.

10074.Name: Hanako (Swimsuit)
10074.ProfileIntroduction:
A young lady from the Make-Up Work Club who's come to the island for the summer.

Her outfit is unconventional, perhaps because she's comfortable with the people she's with. In spite of appearances, she has an honest, sincere side.

Ex.Name: Wet All Over ♥
Ex.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area.
If Hanako's water gauge has at least 1 charge, consumes 1 charge and immediately redraws the EX Skill after activation.

Public.Name: Take It All ♥
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area and creates a circular zone where enemies' <d:DEF> is decreased by <?2> for 20s.

WeaponPassive.Name: Midsummer Truth+
WeaponPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> by <?1> plus a further <?3> and <b:CriticalDamage> by <?2> plus a further <?4>.

ExtraPassive.Name: Filling Up
ExtraPassive.Desc: Whenever an ally other than self uses their EX Skill, charges the water gauge by 40%. Each time the water gauge fully charges to 100%, increases own <b:ATK> by <?1> for 20s. (The water gauge can hold up to 2 full charges)

Weapon.Name: Honest Wish
Weapon.Desc:
Hanako packed this assault rifle for the beach.

She acts like the name has a hidden meaning...

20029.Name: Mimori (Swimsuit)
20029.CharacterSSRNew: If only we could freeze this moment in time...
20029.ProfileIntroduction:
The vice president of the Inner Discipline Club has changed into a swimsuit for the summer.

She's known for her gentle smile and kind demeanor, but dressing in swimwear has her a little more excited than usual.

Ex.Name: It's Summertime!
Ex.Desc: Deploys cover with HP equal to a set amount plus <?2> of Mimori's Max HP. Creates a circular zone around the cover in which allies' <b:AttackSpeed> is increased by <?1> for 20s.

Public.Name: You Need This?
Public.Desc: Every 50s, grants a <b:Shield> with HP equal to <?1> of Healing to the ally with the lowest HP lasting up to 35s.

ExtraPassive.Name: I'm Here for You
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Soft Resolution
Weapon.Desc:
Mimori's automatic pistol.

Her training to become a proper lady never ceases, even when she's at the beach in the summer.

10075.Name: Meru
10075.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Knowledge Liberation Front, a book club at Red Winter Academy.

 Unlike her club mate Momiji, she doesn't just read fan books—she creates them. Writing under the name "Meruri," she draws inspiration from the drama between her fellow students. Even the feud between the Trinity and Gehenna student bodies have made it into her pages, generating some notoriety outside of Red Winter Academy.

Ex.Name: Celestial Inspiration
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and inflicts , continuously dealing damage every 4s for 30s, and for 30s. Each time an ally attacks the enemy inflicted with , deals additional damage equal to of Meru's ATK. (This additional damage cannot critically hit and can trigger up to a maximum of 480 times)

Public.Name: Delusional Drive
Public.Desc: Every 50s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy and inflcts <d:Burn>, continuously dealing <?2> damage every 4s for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Climax Catalyst!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 3rd normal attack will use enhanced ammunition, dealing damage.

Weapon.Name: Creative...Anguish!
Weapon.Desc:
A pistol specially crafted for Meru.

Its name is a bit on-the-nose, but she couldn't think of anything better...

13013.Name: Momiji
13013.ProfileIntroduction:
A literature enthusiast fighting to preserve knowledge in Red Winter Academy's library.

Most of her peers fight for bread and snacks, but she fights for books. Unfortunately, she's a serious otaku, which means that the Secrateriat rejects most of her requests to get more manga in the library... But does Momiji give up? Never!

Ex.Name: An Excellent Medium
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: The Power of Knowledge
Public.Desc: Every 30s, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 20s.

GearPublic.Name: The Power of Knowledge+
GearPublic.Desc: Every 30s, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> and <b:CriticalChance> by <?2> for 20s.

ExtraPassive.Name: The Journey Begins
ExtraPassive.Desc: At the start of battle, increases <b:ATK> by <?1><?2>.
Parameters: and multiplies the area of effect radius of normal attacks by 1.5×
and multiplies the area of effect radius of normal attacks by 1.5×
and multiplies the area of effect radius of normal attacks by 1.5×
and multiplies the area of effect radius of normal attacks by 1.5×

Weapon.Name: Library Rule #7
Weapon.Desc:
Momiji's RPG.

Treat your library books with respect and Momiji will never have to invoke this "rule"...

Gear.Name: Limited Reprint Collection
Gear.Desc: A limited reprint of a manga collection. Even when everyone disagrees, if it's important to one person, then it's an important item.

10076.Name: Kotori (Cheer Squad)
10076.CharacterSSRNew: Knowledge is always useful, no matter where you are!
10076.ProfileIntroduction:
This member of the Engineering Department donned a cheerleading outfit to support her friends.

Her cheers are loud, upbeat, and—most importantly—filled with technical explanations.

Ex.Name: Festive Barrage
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Each hit also knocks back close enemies a distance of <kb:1>.

Public.Name: Uh, About That!
Public.Desc: Every 5 times an ally except self uses their EX Skill, increases the of all allies in a circular area except self by for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Happy to Help!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Each time the buff from Kotori's Basic Skill is applied to an ally, increases own <b:ATK> by <?1> for 30s. (Effect stacks up to 5 times)

Weapon.Name: Professor K
Weapon.Desc:
Kotori's machine gun, also known as EX-Plain.

She has made simple yet sensible (?) modifications for field day.

20030.Name: Haruna (Track)
20030.CharacterSSRNew: The more you move, the more appetite you'll work up. Shall we?
20030.ProfileIntroduction:
Haruna has changed into her gym clothes for the Kivotos Halo Festival.

No matter where she is, Haruna's quest for food never ends. This time, she's set her eyes on the culinary delights that can only be found at Kivotos' biggest athletic event. Maybe it's because of the excitement in the air, but she seems even more friendly than usual.

Ex.Name: The Gourmand's Proposal
Ex.Desc: Repositions up to 4 allies in a circular area to the selected location and restores their HP by <?1> of Healing.

Public.Name: Cautious Approach
Public.Desc: Every 40s, deals <?1> damage to up to 6 enemies and decreases their <d:DEF> by <?2> for 20s.

GearPublic.Name: Cautious Approach+
GearPublic.Desc:
Every 40s, deals <?1> damage to up to 6 enemies and decreases their <d:DEF> by <?2> for 20s.
If 5 or more enemies are hit, enhances the next use of the EX Skill to also grant <b:DotHeal> to allies, restoring their HP by <?3> of Healing every 4s for 20s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Athlete's Dinner
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Ideal
Weapon.Desc:
Haruna's sniper rifle.

She's always scoping out good food, even while exercising.

Gear.Name: Butterfly Wing Decoration
Gear.Desc: Haruna's wing decoration. She's known for switching out its decorations based on her mood and the situation.

10077.Name: Ichika
10077.CharacterSSRNew: Oh? It's not time for us to meet yet, is it? Were you waiting?
10077.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Justice Task Force with a relaxed demeanor.

As a member of the task force, she excels at promoting cooperation and coordination. She's even on good terms with the students of the other academies. While she is known for her easy-going demeanor and friendliness, these traits don't come naturally to her and require a lot of work.
10077.Hobby: Helping others and trying new things

Ex.Name: I Have a Request
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area.

Public.Name: Justice Task Force Network
Public.Desc: Every 30s, increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1> for <?2>.

ExtraPassive.Name: It Was Inevitable
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals <?1> damage as an additional hit to enemies not taking cover.

Weapon.Name: Red Dragon
Weapon.Desc:
Ichika and this assault rifle have been together through thick and thin.

Despite its unassuming appearance, it is capable of unleashing intense power.

10078.Name: Kasumi
10078.CharacterSSRNew: Have I ever told you the true meaning of hot spring development?
10078.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Gehenna Hot Springs Department.

Her mission in life is to develop hot springs wherever there is geothermal activity, and she doesn't care what's in the way. She enjoys the unanimous support of her club members, but outside of her club she is a wanted criminal.

Ex.Name: Giant Heel Crush
Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:DEF> of enemies in a circular area by <?1> for 25s and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: It's About Sending A Message
Public.Desc: Every 35s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

ExtraPassive.Name: Have the Drills Stopped Screaming?
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Each use of Kasumi's EX skill grants one <s:CH0089_ExtraPassive>. Upon reaching 3 stacks, deals an additional <?1> damage to the target(s) of Kasumi's EX skill.
All <s:CH0089_ExtraPassive> stacks are removed after activation.

Weapon.Name: Red Rector
Weapon.Desc:
Kasumi is never without this handgun.

She mostly fires it into the air in order to spice things up. Despite its small, cute design, it's actually very powerful...and loud.

20031.Name: Shigure (Hot Spring)
20031.CharacterSSRNew: We've soaked our outsides, so now it's time to soak our insides.
20031.ProfileIntroduction:
A Spec Ops student who helps run Hot Spring Resort No. 227.

When a hot spring suddenly erupted in the Former Institute, she and Nodoka opened a huge hot spring resort. Unlike Nodoka, however, she doesn't seem to be too interested in expanding the business or making money. She's thrilled for the opportunity to make all kinds of drinks and refreshments for their customers, however.

Ex.Name: Shigure's Special Fruit Milk
Ex.Desc: Continuously restores the HP of allies in a circular area by <?1> of Healing every 4s for 30s.

Public.Name: Want a Bite?
Public.Desc: Every 50s, restores the HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by <?1> of Healing.

ExtraPassive.Name: Sharp Aftertaste
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Spring Punch
Weapon.Desc:
Shigure's multi-shot grenade launcher.

The sight of her skillfully reloading grenades is supposedly one of the key attractions at Hot Springs No. 227.

10079.Name: Misaka Mikoto
10079.ProfileIntroduction:
A student at Tokiwadai Middle School.

Misaka is one of the seven Level 5 espers in Academy City, a place populated by students with supernatural abilities. As an Electromaster, she has the power to manipulate powerful currents of electricity, but she has had difficulty using this power since arriving in Kivotos. She is easy to talk to and has a kind heart, so she tends to get along with others. She's also a fan of a cartoon frog from her world called Gekota.

Ex.Name: The Railgun of Tokiwadai
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a straight line.

Public.Name: It's Going to Sting!
Public.Desc: Every 50s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area and inflicts them with <d:ElectricShock>, continuously dealing <?2> damage every 4s for <?3>.

Passive.Name: Electromagnetic Manipulation
Passive.Desc:
Increases <b:HIT> by <?1>.
Immune to the <c:Confusion> effect from Shokuhou Misaki's EX Skill.

WeaponPassive.Name: Electromagnetic Manipulation+
WeaponPassive.Desc:
Increases <b:ATK> by <?1> and <b:HIT> by <?2>.
Immune to the <c:Confusion> effect from Shokuhou Misaki's EX Skill.

ExtraPassive.Name: Don't Make Me Repeat Myself
ExtraPassive.Desc: Whenever Misaka Mikoto uses her Basic Skill, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for <?2>.

Weapon.Name: Gunbolt
Weapon.Desc:
A specialized firearm made for Misaka Mikoto by the Engineering Department.

Its special features were designed to make use of the user's electrical abilities.

10080.Name: Shokuhou Misaki
10080.CharacterSSRNew: Hmmm... What to do? And what's the story here?
10080.ProfileIntroduction:
A spirited student from Tokiwadai Middle School.

As one of only seven Level 5 espers in Academy City, she leads the largest faction at Tokiwadai Middle School. Her ability, Mental Out, lets her manipulate the minds of those around her, though she's had trouble using this ability since arriving in Kivotos. She has something of a rivalry with fellow Level 5 esper Misaka Mikoto, who also happens to be immune to her influence.

Ex.Name: Mental Out
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to both the targeted enemy and the two closest enemies to them within a circular area and inflicts <c:Confusion> for <?2>.

Public.Name: Assist Me for a Moment
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

ExtraPassive.Name: I'm Very Clever, You Know
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases <b:DEF> and <b:Dodge> by <?1> for 20s whenever Shokuhou Misaki's EX Skill inflicts <c:Confusion> on a target.

Weapon.Name: Mental Pointer
Weapon.Desc:
An exclusive firearm made for Shokuhou Misaki by the Engineering Department.

This pretty pistol is a perfect fashion accessory.

26011.Name: Saten Ruiko
26011.ProfileIntroduction:
A cheerful student from Sakugawa Middle School.

She was introduced to Misaka Mikoto, an upperclassman from Tokiwadai Middle School, by her good friend and classmate Uiharu Kazari. Although she is a Level 0 without any powers, she has good instincts and a knack for tracking down clues. Her favorite things are urban legends and desserts. She makes a point of trying out new desserts in her free time.
26011.Hobby: Online mahjong, hunting down new desserts

Ex.Name: Bat Full Swing
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: Secret Weapon: Mackerel Curry
Public.Desc: Every 45s, increases the <b:ATK> of one ally by <?1> for 20s. The number of allies affected increases by 1 with each subsequent activation of the skill, up to a maximum of 3.

ExtraPassive.Name: I'm Here Too...!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Bullet Swinger
Weapon.Desc:
A personalized firearm made for Saten Ruiko by the Engineering Department.

Sturdy enough to be used as a makeshift bludgeon.

10081.Name: Yukari
10081.ProfileIntroduction:
A first-year member of Hyakkiyako's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Despite being a descendant of the historic Kadenokouji family, she admired the Hyakkaryouran and joined them instead of following her duties. She has a strong sense of pride in being a member, and nothing can stop her from doing all she can to serve the council. It's not an easy path, but she's strong and easily brushes things off. She really looks up to the upperclassmen of Hyakkaryouran, especially Nagusa.

Ex.Name: Blooming Resolution
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to enemies in a circular area. Consumes in multiples of 10, dealing an additional guaranteed critical damage for every 10 consumed.

Public.Name: Long-Awaited Reunion
Public.Desc: Every 40s, gain <?1> <s:Pray> (max. 50 stacks) and increases <b:ATK> by <?2> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Bear the Responsibility
ExtraPassive.Desc: Obtains an <s:Pray='Invocation'> for each unit of skill cost consumed by allies except self (max. 50 stacks). Each time 10 <s:Pray> are obtained, increases <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> for 15s.

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - A Girl's Determination
Weapon.Desc:
Yukari's standard-issue Hyakkaryouran rifle.

These standard rifles were objects of admiration for her back in middle school. Finally owning one is proof of how hard she's worked to achieve her dream. She's known for her limitless determination.

10082.Name: Renge
10082.CharacterSSRNew: We're the authors of my youth, Sensei!
10082.ProfileIntroduction:
The Assault Squad Captain of Hyakkiyako Academy's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Renge has a strong sense of justice and duty. She is often called Hyakkaryouran's Disciplinarian because of her strict teaching methods. She is soft-hearted and cares deeply for her underclassmen. She's always taken pride in her Hyakkaryouran responsibilities and has cherished every moment with the club. However, Renge sometimes regrets watching her youth pass her by while she was immersed in her duties. She's passionate about training and marksmanship, but is an idealist who dreams of a life like the ones she sees in mangas and movies.

Ex.Name: Hyakkaryouran Marksmanship
Ex.Desc: Inflicts <d:Burn> on enemies in a fan-shaped area, continuously dealing <?1> damage every 4s for 20s, and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: Burning Passion
Public.Desc: Every 30s, gains the effect of <s:CH0224_Public> and increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 22s.

GearPublic.Name: Burning Passion+
GearPublic.Desc:
Every 30s, gains the effect of <s:CH0224_Public> and increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 22s.
While under the effect of <s:CH0224_Public>, Renge's EX Skill will ignore 35% of the target's DEF.

ExtraPassive.Name: A Commander's Duty
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals <?1> damage as an additional hit when attacking while under the effect of <s:CH0224_Public>.

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Blazing Youth
Weapon.Desc:
Renge's favorite rifle.

A ceremonial Hyakkaryouran rifle, modified to fit her unique style. It's a trusty companion that's never failed her. Paired with her excellent marksmanship, she's a deadly threat in battle.

Gear.Name: White Ribbon of Youth
Gear.Desc: The ribbon used by the protagonist of Renge's favorite coming-of-age novel. It carries Renge's wish for a similar life.

10083.Name: Kikyou
10083.CharacterSSRNew:
You won't regret standing by my side.
I'll prove my worth.
10083.ProfileIntroduction:
Operations Officer of Hyakkiyako Academy's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Kikyou values logic and reason above all else. This combined with her deep loyalty to the Hyakkaryouran can make her a terrifying foe to face. She may be the mastermind behind all Hyakkaryouran strategy and operations, but she would never sacrifice an ally's safety for a victory. To her, there are only enemies or allies. Her ruthlessness terrifies her foes, while her kindness endears her to her fellow club members.
10083.Hobby: Spinning yarn, reading military history, sunbathing

Ex.Name: Heavenly Tactics
Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:DEF> of enemies in a cross-shaped area by <?1> for 30s, and deals <?2> damage to them.

Public.Name: Know Thyself and Thy Enemy, Conquer a Hundred Battles
Public.Desc: Every 35s, increases the of all allies except self in a circular area by an amount depending on the number of allies that are affected, for 25s. 1 ally: . 2 allies: . 3 or more allies: .

ExtraPassive.Name: Furin Kazan Strategy
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 30s, increases by for 20s and gains one stack of (max. 3 stacks). When at 3 stacks of , activating the EX Skill will additionally consume all stacks of and reduce the of all allies except self by 1 (for 1 EX Skill use).

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Keen Wisdom
Weapon.Desc:
A rifle Kikyou is never seen without.

As operations officer of the Hyakkaryouran, she's rarely on the front lines. But when she is, her smarts and this trusty weapon always lead her to victory.

20032.Name: Eimi (Swimsuit)
20032.CharacterSSRNew: Out on the sea, a swimsuit is a must!
20032.ProfileIntroduction:
An agent of Millennium's Super Phenomenon Task Force.

She's usually difficult to understand, but her unexpected excitement for this icy trip is easy to see. However, her fashion sense remains as bizarre as ever.

Ex.Name: Dependable Aid
Ex.Desc: Repositions up to 6 allies in a circular area to the selected location, granting them a <b:Shield> with HP equal to <?1> of Healing lasting up to 30s<?2>.

Public.Name: An Eimi Original
Public.Desc: Every 45s, increases the <b:AttackSpeed> of 4 allies by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Slippery Slope
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Multi-Tactical
Weapon.Desc:
Eimi's favorite shotgun with a crude design.

Multifaceted like its name suggests, it can be used for various purposes even in extreme environments.

10084.Name: Kotama (Camp)
10084.CharacterSSRNew: I've been waiting to hear your footsteps come closer, Sensei.
10084.ProfileIntroduction:
Veritas' surveillance expert dressed for cold weather.

Kotama was resistant to Chihiro's demands that the Veritas members experience the outdoors at first, but she's excited for the chance to record the many sounds of nature. She really enjoys the different ambiences she's found during the trip, but the sound of Sensei's voice is still her favorite.

Ex.Name: Bear Bell Toss
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to one enemy and inflicts <c:Confusion> for <?2>.

Public.Name: Resonance Effect
Public.Desc: Every 45s, increases the <b:ATK> of both self and one other ally by <?1> for 35s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Transmission Interference
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals <?1> damage as an additional hit when attacking enemies.

Weapon.Name: Echo Link
Weapon.Desc:
A pistol that Kotama always has tucked away into her belt.

She's modified the silencers to make firing a bullet so quiet she won't disturb the wildlife.

10085.Name: Hare (Camp)
10085.CharacterSSRNew: A can of Frenzy MAX should always be enjoyed cold!
10085.ProfileIntroduction:
This Veritas member is bundled up to withstand the winter's cold.

Hare can't remember the last time she's left the confines of her desk, and she can't help but be a little nervous at a campsite with no Wi-Fi. While she's accepted losing most of her creature comforts, she draws the line at no cans of Frenzy MAX.

Ex.Name: Campfire Delicacies
Ex.Desc:
Increases the <b:ATK> of one ally except self by <?1> for 26s.
Additionally, grants 5 <s:CH0233_ExtraPassive> to self (max. 15 stacks)

Public.Name: Share the Warmth
Public.Desc: Every 50s, increases the <b:ATK> of all allies in a circular area by <?1> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Joys of Camping
ExtraPassive.Desc: While holding stacks of <s:CH0233_ExtraPassive>, deals <?1> damage as an additional hit when attacking enemies (consumes 1 stack of <s:CH0233_ExtraPassive>).

Weapon.Name: Auto Aimer
Weapon.Desc:
Hare's bullpup assault rifle.

It's been modded for the outdoors with various new features: ignition for starting a campfire and an automatic bear-targeting feature. It couldn't account for user panic when Hare actually encountered a bear, however.

10087.Name: Ako (Dress)
10087.CharacterSSRNew: I won't allow a single mistake on our mission!
10087.ProfileIntroduction:
Senior administrator of the Gehenna Prefect Team and secretary to Head Prefect Hina.

She's dressed up in bold formal wear for the upcoming party to stand proudly by Hina's side. Ako's well-known and admired for her impeccable attention to detail and competency, but she's upping the ante this time to become the perfect agent.

Ex.Name: Perfect Agent
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:CriticalChance> by <?1> and <b:CriticalDamage> by <?2> of all allies in a circular area for 30s. Grants 1 stack of <s:CH0231_ExtraPassive> to self for each ally affected (max. 15 stacks).

Public.Name: I Don't Miss!
Public.Desc: Every 35s, decreases the of one enemy by for 22s. Also deals damage to the target depending on the number of stacks of held: 3 or fewer stacks: damage. 4~7 stacks: damage. 8~11 stacks: damage. 12 or more stacks: damage.

ExtraPassive.Name: Operation Outcome
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for each stack of <s:CH0231_ExtraPassive> held.

Weapon.Name: Hot Shot
Weapon.Desc:
Ako's pistol.

It's been designed to perfectly fit Ako's skill set, this time with an emphasis on her secret role as Gehenna's special agent.

16014.Name: Ibuki
16014.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Pandemonium Society and a mascot of sorts.

Despite being an elementary school student at Gehenna, she was recognized for her smarts and abilities and invited to the esteemed Pandemonium Society. She's the youngest member of the club and is excessively doted on by her seniors. In return, Ibuki does her utmost to not be a burden to her fellow club members and follows directions as best she can.

Ex.Name: Ibuki's Magic Time!
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:ATK> of all allies except self in a circular area by <?1> for 35s.

ExtraSkills.Name: Happy Patrolling with Iroha!
ExtraSkills.Desc: While Ibuki is aboard Iroha's Toramaru, Toramaru deals damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: Don't Be Naughty!
Public.Desc: Every 30s, deals <?1> damage to one enemy and decreases their <d:ATK> by <?2> for 20s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Pandemonium Society's Cute Mascot
ExtraPassive.Desc: EX Skill also restores own HP by <?1> of Healing each time it is activated.

Weapon.Name: Yay, Bang Bang!
Weapon.Desc:
Ibuki's favorite firearm.

It was originally just a ceremonial rifle given to her by the Pandemonium Society, but she quickly made it her own by decorating it with her favorite stickers and accessories. It's one of her most prized possessions.

20033.Name: Makoto
20033.CharacterSSRNew:
It is time, Sensei!
You shall join the Pandemonium Society!
20033.ProfileIntroduction:
Pandemonium Society's Chairman.

An ambitious leader whose schemes know no bounds. Her thoughtless plans often get the group into trouble, but she brushes it off as if it wasn't all her fault. She sees Ibuki as a little sister to dote on, and Iroha as one to boss around.

Ex.Name: I-I Made a Mistake!
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to enemies in a circular area. The amount of damage dealt depends on the number of enemies within the area: 4 or fewer: damage 5~9: damage 10 or more: damage.

Public.Name: Listen Carefully!
Public.Desc: Every 55s, decreases the <d:DEF> of enemies in a circular area by <?1> for 35s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Invincible! The True Leader of Gehenna!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: The Honored One
Weapon.Desc:
Sniper rifle used by Makoto.

Makoto commissioned this masterpiece from a renowned craftsman as a representation of her authority. She rarely actually steps onto the battlefield herself though, and it doesn't see much action.

10086.Name: Hina (Dress)
10086.ProfileIntroduction:
The Head Prefect of the Gehenna Academy sporting a beautiful dress for the upcoming party.

This is the type of event she'd usually think of as a bother, but the promise of Sensei's presence at Gehenna's party has piqued her interest. She might not even be aware of the enthusiasm oozing out of her as she diligently practices her piano solo.

Ex.Name: Opening: Ishbosheth
Ex.Desc:
Adopts a concentrated firing stance for 10s.
While in this stance, movement and normal attacks are disabled, and changes EX Skill for the next three uses (skill is immediately redrawn each time).
CC effects will cancel the concentrated firing stance.

ExtraSkills.Name: Melody's First Note
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a straight line. Damage to subsequent enemies is reduced by 45% per enemy hit (to a minimum of 10% of the original damage).
This attack ignores Stability and will always deal its maximum damage.
Increases the remaining duration of concentrated firing stance to 10s.

ExtraSkills.Name: Melody's Second Note
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a straight line. Damage to subsequent enemies is reduced by 45% per enemy hit (to a minimum of 10% of the original damage).
This attack ignores Stability and will always deal its maximum damage.
Increases the remaining duration of concentrated firing stance to 10s.

ExtraSkills.Name: The Final Song
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a straight line. Damage to subsequent enemies is reduced by 45% per enemy hit (to a minimum of 10% of the original damage).
This attack ignores Stability and will always deal its maximum damage.
Ends concentrated firing stance after activation.

Public.Name: Thorough Preparation
Public.Desc: Increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1> and <b:HIT> by <?2> at the start of battle. (Activates only once per battle)

WeaponPassive.Name: A Performer's Mindset+
WeaponPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> by <?1> plus a further <?3> and <b:CriticalChance> by <?2> plus a further <?4>.

ExtraPassive.Name: My Sincere Feelings
ExtraPassive.Desc: While in concentrated firing stance, increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1> and become immune to <c:Provoke>.

Weapon.Name: Destroyer of Denouement
Weapon.Desc:
A multipurpose machine gun Hina wields as naturally as any limb.

It's a merciless weapon built for punishing wrongdoers. But this time, Hina handles it with self-discipline and gentle compassion for someone else's sake.

10088.Name: Kayoko (Dress)
10088.CharacterSSRNew: I'm worried...but it's all right. Everything will be fine.
10088.ProfileIntroduction:
The department head of Problem Solver 68 who infiltrated the Opera House.

Although she claims her attire is unfamiliar, there's no hint of awkwardness. She calmly completes her task regardless of the crowd's gaze.

Ex.Name: Shadow Shots
Ex.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to one enemy. This attack ignores <?2> of the enemy's DEF. While in <s:CH0239_ExtraPassive> status, this attack is also guaranteed critical.
(<s:CH0239_ExtraPassive> status is removed after activation).

Public.Name: Recovered Senses
Public.Desc: Every 25s, increases <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> for 16s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Infiltration Mode
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Begin combat with the <s:CH0239_ExtraPassive> status. If attacked, this status is removed. After losing the <s:CH0239_ExtraPassive> status, it will be regained if not attacked for 10s.
Also increases <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> while in the <s:CH0239_ExtraPassive> status.

Weapon.Name: Demon's Roar
Weapon.Desc:
A pistol Kayoko always carries with her.

Equipped with a silencer, it's very practical, especially for covert infiltrations.

10089.Name: Aru (Dress)
10089.CharacterSSRNew: Finally, the day has come. Enjoy the show.
10089.ProfileIntroduction:
The boss of Problem Solver 68, now entrusted with a covert commission.

Though this attire is not her usual style of clothing, her disguise is perfect at first glance. She hides her delight at receiving a rare hard-boiled assignment behind a poker face.

Ex.Name: Intriguing Proposal
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:CriticalDamage> of one ally except self by <?1> for 30s.

Public.Name: Beneficial Deal
Public.Desc: Every 50s, restores the HP of the ally with the lowest HP (excluding self) by <?1> of Healing.

ExtraPassive.Name: Favorable Trade
ExtraPassive.Desc: Attacks have a 30% chance to decrease the target's <d:CriticalChanceResistPoint> by <?1> for 13s. 5s cooldown between activations.

Weapon.Name: Wine Red/Admire
Weapon.Desc:
Aru's semi-automatic sniper rifle and a constant companion even during special missions.

Its design complements her look even in the most elegant places.

20034.Name: Akari (New Year)
20034.CharacterSSRNew: It's the new year. I should decide what to eat first. And how much!
20034.ProfileIntroduction:
Akari dressed up for the New Year.

She has her usual bright and cheerful smile, but Akari seems more lighthearted than usual. Is it due to the anticipation of the coming year, or...

Ex.Name: I'm Just Borrowing It!
Ex.Desc: Deploys Akari aboard a School Lunch Promotion Vehicle for 30s, granting it an additional <?1> of Akari's <b:MAXHP>. The School Lunch Promotion Vehicle does not perform normal attacks. Only one tactical support vehicle may be deployed at any given time.

Public.Name: Something Like This?
Public.Desc: Every 40s, creates a circular area centered on the ally with the lowest HP in which allies' <b:DEF> is increased by <?1>, as long as they stay within range, for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Who Wants Seconds?
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:EnhanceMysticRate> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Mark of Gluttony
Weapon.Desc:
Akari's favorite assault rifle.

Anything that hinders her travels or meals must first have a stern conversation with this firearm.

10090.Name: Umika
10090.CharacterSSRNew: I heard there was a festival going on and came to check it out! Oh...was I misinformed?
10090.ProfileIntroduction:
A first-year Festival Operations Department member.

Raised in the countryside, she has a deep love of city festivals. She's practically a festival encyclopedia and lists off trivia whenever she opens her mouth. She occasionally needs a reminder that silence is golden.

Ex.Name: The Festival Begins!
Ex.Desc: Summons a firework launcher with <?1> of Umika's <b:MAXHP> for 50s. Up to 5 firework launchers can be summoned at a time.

Public.Name: Tamaya!
Public.Desc: Every 10 normal attacks, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 30s. Also increases the <b:ATK> of all summoned firework launchers by <?2> for 7s and issues them with an order to fire.

GearPublic.Name: Tamaya!+
GearPublic.Desc:
Every 10 normal attacks, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 30s. Also increases the <b:ATK> by <?2> and <b:EnhanceMysticRate> by <?3> of all summoned firework launchers for 7s and issues them with an order to fire.
Every third activation of this skill grants all firework launchers an additional order to fire.

ExtraPassive.Name: Festival Thrill
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 55 normal attacks, increases by for 40s and reduces own by 3 (for 1 EX Skill use).

Weapon.Name: Festival Fever
Weapon.Desc:
Umika's beloved assault rifle.

She claims it's the perfect festival accessory, great for announcing the start of the festivities or resolving any minor disputes that arise during the event.

Gear.Name: Old Festival Doll
Gear.Desc: A doll that Umika bought at her first festival. It came as a pair.

20035.Name: Tsubaki (Guide)
20035.CharacterSSRNew: Everyone...come over here...line up side by side...
20035.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Inner Discipline Club who never stops practicing good sleeping habits.

Although she has started working as a tour guide for Hyakkiyako's trips, it seems that she doesn't want to give up on her healthy sleep habits. Bouncing between moments of drowsiness and sharp focus, she faithfully upholds both commitments.

Ex.Name: President's Guidance
Ex.Desc: Creates a circular zone for 45s in which allies' <b:ATK> is increased by <?1> as long as they stay within range.

Public.Name: Good Sleep Is the Best Medicine
Public.Desc: Every 45s, restores the HP of the ally with the lowest HP by <?1> of Healing and increases their <b:CriticalChanceResistPoint> by <?2> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Excellent Service
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Sleeping Companion Ⅱ
Weapon.Desc:
Tsubaki's SMG.

Although typically unobtrusive during her regular tasks, this small and compact firearm seems especially helpful when she's working as a guide.

10091.Name: Kazusa (Band)
10091.CharacterSSRNew: Every day is unique. I never grow tired of it all.
10091.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the lead vocalist and bassist of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Accidentally became the lead vocalist by way of an offhand remark, then refused to let herself back down from it. She seems accustomed to the chaos of the music scene now, and accepts it with ease.

Ex.Name: Historic First Verse
Ex.Desc:
Increases the <b:AttackSpeed> of all allies in a circular area around Kazusa by <?1> for 40s.
Gain <?2> of <s:CH0220_Public> for 40s. (max. 2 stacks)

Public.Name: Bass Tuning
Public.Desc: Every 35s, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 26s.

GearPublic.Name: Bass Tuning+
GearPublic.Desc:
Every 35s, increases <b:ATK> by <?1> for 26s.
Increases all ally Strikers' <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?2> for 26s. For ally targets with stacks of <s:CH0220_Public>, increases their <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?3> instead.

ExtraPassive.Name: Sweet Voice
ExtraPassive.Desc: Deals <?1> as additional damage when attacking for each stack of <s:CH0220_Public> held (max. 2).

Weapon.Name: Mabinogion
Weapon.Desc:
A machine gun that's making history with Kazusa.

It's also the closest witness to all of Kazusa's various guises.

Gear.Name: シュガーラッシュカスタムLP盤
Gear.Desc: 初めて完奏した時の演奏を録音したLP盤。初々しながらも彼女らしさが感じられる。曲だけではない意外なものまで収録されているようで……？

10092.Name: Yoshimi (Band)
10092.CharacterSSRNew:
Pay attention!
 There won't be a second time!
10092.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club, and the guitarist of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Although she started on a whim, she believes in doing things right. She also handles the band's visuals, including icons, symbols, and outfits.

Ex.Name: Climax Crescendo
Ex.Desc:
Increases <b:ATK> and <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1> for 50s and gain 5 stacks of <s:CH0220_Public> (max. 5 stacks).
Stacks of <s:CH0220_Public> will gradually expire every 10s.

Public.Name: Visual Maker
Public.Desc: Every 10 normal attacks, deals <?1> damage to one enemy. Damage increases by 5% for each stack of <s:CH0220_Public> held by self or allies. (max. 8 stacks)

ExtraPassive.Name: Sweet Harmonics
ExtraPassive.Desc: Yoshimi's Basic Skill deals <?1> as additional damage every 3 times it is activated.

Weapon.Name: Sweet Driver
Weapon.Desc:
Yoshimi's assault rifle, which is always by her side.

 It's typically used as her weapon of choice in dessert competitions. It fires shots as lively as the notes from her guitar.

16015.Name: Airi (Band)
16015.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the leader of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Determined to change her unassuming personality, she led the group into participating in the band event. Little does she know, she's the glue that keeps everyone together.
16015.Hobby: Checking out dessert shops, tea parties

Ex.Name: Joyful Melody
Ex.Desc: Increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1> and gain <s:CH0220_Public> for 30s.

Public.Name: Chocolate Mint Scale
Public.Desc: Every 12 normal attacks, deal damage to one enemy.

ExtraPassive.Name: Emotions Deluge
ExtraPassive.Desc: While under the effect of <s:CH0220_Public>, normal attacks have a 10% chance to decrease the target's <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> by <?1> for 16s. 5s cooldown between activations.

Weapon.Name: Sweet Dessert
Weapon.Desc:
Airi's favorite machine gun.

Its unchanged appearance serves as a reminder of something Airi herself almost forgot.

10093.Name: Kirara

10108.ProfileIntroduction: Seminar's accountant, sporting her pajamas to enjoy a leisurely rest. She always performs her duties perfectly and on time. However, constant issues at school, in conjunction with her chronic insomnia, has made it difficult for her to get rest. She's equipped herself with a fluffy pillow and soft, well-fitted pajamas to achieve the perfect rest, but the mischievous members of Millennium, who seem to have little regard for daytime or nighttime, seem determined to disturb her peace.

Ex.Name: Peroro in a Pinch
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and decreases their by for 25s. If the target's defense type is Light Armor, decreases their by for 25s instead.

Public.Name: Bedtime Routine
Public.Desc: Every 30s, restores own HP by <?1> of Healing.

ExtraPassive.Name: Still Groggy
ExtraPassive.Desc: Each time HP is restored, increases <b:DEF> by <?1> for 30s (stacks up to 7 times).

Weapon.Name: Logic & Reason
Weapon.Desc: Two submachine guns belonging to Yuuka. Even these two firearms, representing her logic and reason, are not able to chase away her chronic insomnia.

10109.Name: Noa (Pajamas)
10109.ProfileIntroduction: Seminar's secretary, who's put on pajamas to enjoy a cozy rest. This secretary's holidays are usually quiet, as she tends to operate in solitude. However, the moments she spends with other Seminar members are the exception. No matter how ridiculous the commotions and misunderstandings her adorable underclassmen and warm-hearted colleagues cause, Noa silently watches and records the scenes, always accompanied by a light smile.

Ex.Name: Noise Curfew
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and inflicts them with for 20s. Each time an ally attacks the enemy inflicted with this debuff, deals additional damage equal to of Noa (Pajamas)'s ATK. (This additional damage cannot critically hit and can trigger up to a maximum of 240 times)

ExtraSkills.Name: Shh, Lights Out
ExtraSkills.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and inflicts them with for 20s. Each time an ally attacks the enemy inflicted with this debuff, deals additional damage equal to of Noa (Pajamas)'s ATK. (This additional damage cannot critically hit and can trigger up to a maximum of 240 times)

Public.Name: Favorite Pillow
Public.Desc: After activating the EX Skill "Noise Curfew" twice, increases by for 30s and changes the next one use of the EX Skill to "Shh, Lights Out".

ExtraPassive.Name: Secretary's Edge
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 10 normal attacks, increases <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1> for 10s.

Weapon.Name: Secretary on Record
Weapon.Desc: A pistol equipped with Noa's conversion kit. This multi-use pistol is perfect for both weighing down papers and late-night reading, Noa's favorite pastime.

10110.Name: Seia
10110.CharacterSSRNew: Like this, all roads connect to one.
10110.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Tea Party, from Trinity General School, and leader of Sanctus.

Others find her pedantic and unpredictable. A bit capricious and impulsive, rather like a noble. Following her recovery from an assassination attempt, she's shown more of her stubborn and childish side.

Ex.Name: The Garden's Embrace
Ex.Desc:
Reduces the <b:CostChange> of one ally except self for their next <?1> EX Skill uses by 50% (The amount reduced is rounded down).
Increases <b:CostRegen> by <?2> for 15s.

Public.Name: Sharp Advice
Public.Desc: Every 35s, increases the <b:EnhancePierceRate> of both self and one other ally by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Enveloping Intuition
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every third activation of the EX Skill, grants a <b:Shield> with HP equal to <?1> of Healing to self and the target of the EX Skill for 25s.

Weapon.Name: Keen Illumination
Weapon.Desc:
Seia's favorite pistol.

It has an elegant and stable design, as expected of a Tea Party member. It's always loaded, just like Seia, who's not hesitant to spit harsh words when the situation calls for it.

10112.Name: Asuna (School)
10112.CharacterSSRNew: Let's do lots of fun things!
10112.ProfileIntroduction:
A C&C Agent deployed to help facilitate the Millennium Expo.

Having changed into a school uniform, she works as both an event guide and a security officer. Her unpredictable actions and unique, cheerful personality make her very popular as a guide.

Ex.Name: Here, Over Here!
Ex.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> of self and Special students by <?1> for 19s.

Public.Name: Say Cheese!
Public.Desc: Every 40s, restores the HP of all allies except self in a circular area by <?1> of Healing.

ExtraPassive.Name: This Way!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases <b:ATK> of self and Special students by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Surprise Party
Weapon.Desc:
Asuna's assault rifle.

The name is quite lively, though unrelated to the mission.

26014.Name: Karin (School)
26014.ProfileIntroduction:
A C&C agent deployed as a guide for the Millennium Expo.

On top of her basic guide work, she also becomes a bodyguard for students when needed. Secretly enjoys the ordinary school uniform she's wearing for the occasion, as she almost never gets a chance to wear one. Thanks to her unique and kind personality, students who'd been afraid of her before are now getting to know and like her.

Ex.Name: Guide Shining in Crisis
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy. Damage is multiplied by up to 3× the lower the current HP of the target. If target HP is below 20% while activating the EX Skill, increases by , by and by for 30s.

Public.Name: Support From Afar
Public.Desc: Every 40s, deals damage to one enemy. Damage is multiplied by up to 3× the lower the current HP of the target.

ExtraPassive.Name: Popular Guide
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Big Eye
Weapon.Desc:
Karin's massive, custom sniper rifle.

No matter the target, she shoots it down with pinpoint accuracy.

10111.Name: Neru (School)
10111.CharacterSSRNew: I really can't get used to this.
10111.ProfileIntroduction:
The leader of C&C. She took off her bomber jacket to do her job as the Millennium Expo's guide.

Normally, she'd never have done that, but she's a sucker for those who ask nicely. Her primary job is to give directions and maintain security, but she also has another hidden mission.

Ex.Name: You Want to Fight?
Ex.Desc: Grants to both self and target enemy for 70s. Increases the damage Neru (Uniform) deals the target she is by 0.2×. Immediately redraws the EX Skill once and changes it to "This'll Hurt, Y'know" while Neru (Uniform) is .

ExtraSkills.Name: This'll Hurt, Y'know
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Gains one stack of <s:CH0280_Ex_02> (max. 5 stacks) and deals <?1> damage to one enemy.
 Removes all stacks of <s:CH0280_Ex_02> when EX Skill reverts to "You Want to Fight?".

Public.Name: Let's Have Some Fun, Then!
Public.Desc: Every 35s, increases <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: I'll Shoot You For Real
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases by . Increases the damage dealt by the EX Skill "This'll Hurt, Y'know" by 0.35× for each stack of held.

Weapon.Name: Twin Dragons
Weapon.Desc: Neru's dual SMGs. Her outfit may be different, but her guns are just as flashy as before.

20041.Name: Rio
20041.CharacterSSRNew: We'll meet again in a place where light doesn't shine.
20041.ProfileIntroduction:
President of Seminar, the student council of Millennium School.

Her desires for peace, in Millennium and the world, drive her to do whatever she thinks is necessary. As a result, she became known as everyone's "big sister." Her stylistic and aesthetic tastes are quite unique. Her Avant Guard robot corps, which is known only to a few students, exemplifies those tastes.

Ex.Name: Big Sister
Ex.Desc:
Immediately redraws Rio's EX Skill, copying the target ally's EX Skill (for one use) and increasing their <b:ATK> by <?1> for 20s.
(The copied card inherits the status of the target ally's EX Skill card)
(The base cost of the copied card will be the same as the base cost of the original card minus 1, to a minimum of 0. Cost increase/decrease effects will be calculated using the base cost of the copied card.)

Public.Name: The Only Truth
Public.Desc: Every 30s, decreases one enemy's <d:DEF> by <?1> for 19s and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Name: Avant Guard
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Policy Maker
Weapon.Desc:
Rio's self-defense pistol.

Although she's not a particularly good shot, she carries it everywhere with her, reasoning that it would be foolish not to carry a gun in Kivotos.

20042.Name: Maki (Camp)
20042.CharacterSSRNew: Is there a good canvas I can use to express this inspiration?
20042.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of Veritas who dressed up in warm clothes to fight the cold winter.

Although she's feeling a bit down from leaving the warm indoors for unexpected outdoor activities, she's getting new inspirations from the unfamiliar scenery, and is making it through somehow. It's a bit of a shame that she can't log in to online communities to share this unique inspiration.

Ex.Name: More, Just A Bit More...!
Ex.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to one enemy.
(This attack ignores <b:Shield>)

Public.Name: Traces of Art
Public.Desc: Every 45s, increases <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1> for 25s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Sparkle of Sunrise
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Auto Lacquer
Weapon.Desc:
Maki's multipurpose machine gun, often used to write graffiti.

It's a bit too heavy to bring along to camping trips and other outdoor activities, but her burning passion for art is not limited by location.

10113.Name: Sena (Casual)
10113.CharacterSSRNew: Reporting that I am off duty today.
10113.ProfileIntroduction:
Sena chose this casual outfit for her day off.

Even when she's off duty, she does not forget about her mission as the president of Medical Emergency Club. However, she secretly hopes for a change of pace. Gehenna's Medical Emergency Club president expresses her curiosity with a lighter mood than usual.

Ex.Name: Emergency Support
Ex.Desc: Grants <b:DotHeal> to allies in a circular area, continuously restoring HP equal to <?1> of Healing every 4s for 32s.

Public.Name: Medic's Resupply
Public.Desc: Every 40s, increases <b:HealPower> by <?1> and <b:AttackSpeed> by <?2> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Heaven of Curiosity
ExtraPassive.Desc: Multiplies the area of effect radius of normal attacks by <?1>, but changes normal attack damage to <?2>.

Weapon.Name: Portable Emergency Kit
Weapon.Desc:
Sena's compact grenade launcher.

Even on its days off, its functionality remains unchanged.

10114.Name: Juri (Part-Timer)
10114.ProfileIntroduction:
Juri changed into her uniform as a cafe part timer.

Surprisingly, she seemingly succeeded in cooking a dish she'd been hoping to perfect...but in the end, she was faced with the same result as always. Regardless, she's truly happy to have succeeded at cooking, even temporarily, and continues to practice and work hard.

Ex.Name: Juri's...Final Touch?
Ex.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to one enemy. 
Inflicts <d:Chill>, continuously dealing <?2> damage every 4s for 16s. 
Inflicts <c:Fear> for <?3>.

Public.Desc: Every 45s, increases the <b:HealEffectiveness> of both the ally with the lowest HP and self by <?1> for 32s.

ExtraPassive.Desc: When inflicted with a Crowd Control effect, restores own HP equal to <?1> of Healing.

Weapon.Name: Lunch Club Defense Gun Type B
Weapon.Desc:
Juri's shotgun.

Whether for the School Lunch Club or part-time activities, it's a necessity...or at least that's what she claims.

20043.Name: Izumi (New Year)
20043.CharacterSSRNew: Let's look for a new combination of flavors!
20043.ProfileIntroduction:
Even if she's in a kimono, she's still the usual Izumi.

Even on New Year's, Izumi's passion for challenging food stays strong. Perhaps that's one of the reasons why she has such a bright smile.

Ex.Name: Takoyaki for All!
Ex.Desc: Restores the HP of allies in a circular area by <?1> of Healing and summons Izumi (New Year) at the center for 30s.

ExtraSkills.Name: A Hearty Meal!
ExtraSkills.Desc: Increases the <b:ATK> of all allies in a circular area around Izumi (New Year) by <?1> as long as they stay within range.

ExtraPassive.Name: Let's Go Together!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:HealEffectiveness> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Daily Cutlery
Weapon.Desc:
Izumi's machine gun.

For someone on a journey to discover new flavors, there's no companion more reliable.

10115.Name: Rei
10115.CharacterSSRNew: Practice like it's a real game, play like it's practice!
10115.ProfileIntroduction:
Millennium Baseball Club's cleanup hitter.

She has a bold dream of reforming the Millennium Baseball Club, which is better defined as a physics dynamics club than an actual baseball club. Her alliance with Sumire is a strange one, considering Sumire's boundless energy. They do end up having quite a few disagreements when in the game, however.

Ex.Name: Millennium's Cleanup Hitter!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Desc: Whenever 4 enemies are defeated, increases <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1> for 20s and gain one stack of <s:CH0245_Public>. (10s cooldown between activations)

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases by . After gaining 3 stacks of , reduces own by (for 1 EX Skill use) and remove all stacks of .

Weapon.Name: Moon Shot!
Weapon.Desc:
Rei's recoilless launcher. Its bullets are imbued with her fervent desire to hit a home run.

One day, she'll land a hit that makes it to the moon and back.

20044.Name: Sumire (Part-Timer)
20044.CharacterSSRNew: Hydration and nutrition are both important.
20044.ProfileIntroduction:
Due to a series of events, Sumire ended up working for concessions at the stadium.

However, Sumire finds a way to incorporate weights, and even the uniform, into a training exercise.

Ex.Name: Catch and Pitch
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and inflicts them with for 20s. Each time an ally attacks the enemy inflicted with this debuff, deals additional damage equal to of Sumire (Part-time Job)'s ATK. (This additional damage cannot critically hit and can trigger up to a maximum of 240 times)

Public.Name: Special Sports Drink
Public.Desc: Every 100 times a critical hit is landed by allies, increases the <b:CriticalDamage> of 4 allies by <?1> for 21s. (25s cooldown between activations)

ExtraPassive.Name: Part-Timer's Will
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases the of all allies who use Piercing type attacks by .

Weapon.Name: Modern Millennium Dumbbell
Weapon.Desc:
Sumire's semi-automatic shotgun.

It's said to have special effects to aid in both her weight training and part-time work.

10116.Name: Saori (Dress)
10116.CharacterSSRNew: N-No problem. If it's for the job...
10116.ProfileIntroduction:
The leader of Arius Squad. She ended up having to wear a dress for a job.

Despite originally wearing her dress for professional reasons, she seems to have truly taken a liking to it. She doesn't seem to recognize her natural inclinations for fashion.

Ex.Name: Witness Elimination
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: Behind the Beauty
Public.Desc: Whenever 8 enemies are defeated, generates <?1> units of skill cost and gain one stack of <s:CH0259_ExtraPassive_01> (only 3 times per battle).
