ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases depending on the number of stacks held: 1 stack: increases by . 2 stacks: increases by . 3 stacks: increases by .

Weapon.Name: Arius Assault Rifle
Weapon.Desc:
Saori's assault rifle.

She might have changed up her look, but her trusty rifle will never change.

10117.Name: Hikari
10117.ProfileIntroduction:
An officer of Highlander Railroad Academy's Central Control Center.

She and her twin sister, Nozomi, were selected for their genius talent in locomotive driving skills, but she's a total flop when it comes to paperwork or administrative work. Her tendency to follow her desires and do things at her own pace, with little regard for others' opinions, causes all sorts of trouble.
10117.Hobby: Practicing bizarre driving skills, observing ants

Ex.Name: Ticket☆Check
Ex.Desc: Increases the of one ally except self by for 32s. If the target ally is able to consume additional cost to enhance their EX Skill, reduces their by (for 1 EX Skill use).

Public.Name: Let's Dock!
Public.Desc: Upon gaining 3 stacks of <s:CH0242_ExtraPassive_01>, consumes all stacks to increase the <b:EnhanceSonicRate> of all Striker allies by <?1> for <?2>. (20s cooldown between activations)

ExtraPassive.Name: Great Performance Scheduuuled...!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every <?1> times an ally except self uses their EX Skill, increases own <b:AttackSpeed> by <?2> for 20s and gain 1 stack of <s:CH0242_ExtraPassive_01> (max. 3 stacks).

Weapon.Name: Ticket Punch
Weapon.Desc:
Hikari's pistol is perfect for dealing with rude passengers.

Surprisingly, the gun seems to be very well maintained.

10118.Name: Nozomi
10118.CharacterSSRNew: Pahyahyahya! Were you waiting for me?
10118.ProfileIntroduction:
An officer of Highlander Railroad Academy's Central Control Center.

She has a bright and cheery personality but a total disregard for fastidiousness or attention to detail. She and her twin sister, Hikari, cause all kinds of havoc. She tends to follow the call of her own desires, but her responsible side takes the stage when she's operating trains.

Ex.Name: Booster ON!!!
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to the targeted enemy and damage to other enemies in a straight line range. Consumes up to 2 additional units of skill cost, increasing the damage dealt by 25% for each additional unit of cost consumed. (EX Cost increase/decrease effects will be calculated using the base cost)

Public.Name: This...Way! This Waaay!
Public.Desc: Every 12 normal attacks, increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1> for 26s.

ExtraPassive.Name: All Aboard!
ExtraPassive.Desc:
All attacks will deal guaranteed critical damage.
Increases <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1> and <b:CriticalDamage> by <?2>.

Weapon.Name: Dead Girl's Switch
Weapon.Desc:
Nozomi's pistol.

Although she rarely finds opportunity to use it, it's always well maintained. That way, she can quickly eliminate any hindrances that dare to interfere with her train's operations.

16017.Name: Aoba
16017.ProfileIntroduction:
Engineer from Highlander Railroad Academy's Freight Logistics Department.

She's very shy and introverted but surprisingly has quite the sharp tongue. But it's easy to miss her malevolent messages because of her tendency to mutter them under her breath. She's always suffering from heavy workloads and unfair treatment, so there is no end to her many complaints.

Ex.Name: I-I Need Repairs...!
Ex.Desc:
Repositions to the selected location, dealing <?1> damage to any enemies Aoba collides with and knocking them back a distance of <kb:1>.
After finishing moving, increases <b:ATK> by <?2> and <b:AttackSpeed> by <?3> for 22s.

Public.Name: P-Preparations Complete...
Public.Desc: Every 40s, increases <b:DEF> by <?1> for 32s.

ExtraPassive.Name: No Expectations
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 12 normal attacks, increases <b:DEF> by <?1> for 20s.

Weapon.Name: Hasty Expectations
Weapon.Desc:
Aoba's shotgun.

Its name really captures her motto, "Have no expectations." It's well-suited for blasting almost anything out of her way.

20045.Name: Pina (Guide)
20045.ProfileIntroduction:
For this field trip, Pina has taken on the role of a tour guide!

Working as a professional guide has done nothing to dull her uniquely bright and cheery personality, nor her relentless positivity. In fact, this passionate Festival Operations Department member is using all her best qualities to make her an even better guide. She may need a chaperone, however, to make sure she doesn't make this field trip into a vigilante experience.

Ex.Name: Activate Work Mode!
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy. Damage increases by 0.15× with . Damage is multiplied by up to 1.5× the lower the current HP of the target.

Public.Name: I'll Be Your Guide!
Public.Desc:
Every 7 times an ally except self uses their EX Skill, gain <s:CH0257_Public> for 40s.
Increases the <b:HealEffectiveness> of the ally with the lowest HP by <?1> for 40s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Ready, Set, Blast!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:EnhanceExplosionRate> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Indiscriminate Shooter
Weapon.Desc:
Pina's stationary machine gun.

The non-stop heat it emits is as fiery as Pina's own heart.

10119.Name: Nagusa
10119.CharacterSSRNew: I await the day when hundreds of flower species bloom in tandem.
10119.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council, who gives off a mysterious aura.

Although she was only the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council's vice president, Nagusa received the Authority of the Presidency, the Hundred Lotus, when former president Ayame disappeared. Despite being an indecisive person, riddled with fears and insecurities, she continues to put one foot in front of the other for the sake of those she holds dear.

Ex.Name: A Hundred Blooming Flowers
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy. Damage is multiplied by up to 3× the higher the current HP of the target.

Public.Name: To Add Flowers to the Brocade
Public.Desc: Every 12 normal attacks, increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1> for 21s.

Passive.Name: Words Which Pierce the Spirit Realm

WeaponPassive.Name: Words Which Pierce the Spirit Realm+

ExtraPassive.Name: Flower Blooming Through the Snow
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases <b:CriticalChance> by <?1> while using the EX skill.

Weapon.Name: Hundred Lotus
Weapon.Desc:
An old rifle that exudes a sense of power.

It's the proof of the Authority of the Presidency, passed down by the Great Prophet Kuzunoha. Only the rightful successor of the Hyakkaryouran is able to wield the Hundred Lotus.

20046.Name: Niya
20046.CharacterSSRNew:
Ah, I seriously have to do it, right?
Fine, fine. I'll get to work.
20046.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Allied Hyakkiyako Academy's Yin-Yang Club.

To outsiders she's the student council president, but the intricate structure of the allied academy makes her role a complicated one. Her reputation precedes her as the president who dodges responsibility...but that's just who she is. Her many schemes appear self-serving at a glance, but behind the scenes, there's much more to the story than it seems.

Ex.Name: Lounging Around
Ex.Desc: Decreases the of enemies in a circular area by for 26s. Deals damage depending on the number of enemies within the area: 3 or fewer: damage 4-6: damage 7 or more: damage.

Public.Desc: Every 30s, decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of enemies in a circular area by <?1> for 20s and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CostRegen> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
Weapon.Desc:
The pistol Niya carries around.

It's strategically worn to be easily spotted, but not a soul can testify that they've ever seen her actually use it.

10120.Name: Natsu (Band)
10120.CharacterSSRNew: Ah... Let us walk the path of ROCK together.
10120.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the drummer and schedule manager of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

She enjoys philosophizing on the meaning of "rock," but she never fully defines it. Because, of course, it is not "rock" to explain.

Ex.Name: The Great Resonance
Ex.Desc:
Restores the HP of allies in a circular area around self by <?1> of Healing every 2s for 24s.
Gain 2 stacks of <s:CH0220_Public> for 25s (max. 2 stacks).

Public.Name: Managing & Planning
Public.Desc: Every 15 normal attacks, increases <b:HealPower> by <?1> for 30s.

Effect varies depending on the number of stacks held. 0 stacks: Decreases by 1 stacks: Decreases by 2 stacks: Decreases by 3 stacks: Decreases by 4 stacks: Decreases by

Weapon.Name: Beyond Lumination
Weapon.Desc:
Natsu's submachine gun.

A weapon used as a last resort by the typically peaceful Natsu, because sometimes the world demands action, not contemplation. Its bullets fire with a rhythmic cadence, much like a drumbeat.

10121.Name: Yukari (Swimsuit)
10121.CharacterSSRNew: I'll shall be perfectly perfect, even at the beach!
10121.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council who is ready for the summer!

She's thrilled to be attending the Hyakkiyako Water Festival with her favorite seniors. Even at the beach, her boundless energy and bright personality shine through.

Ex.Name: Dangerous Summer Sea!
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a circular area.

Public.Name: A Summer Snack!
Public.Desc: Every 35s, increases <b:EnhancePierceRate> by <?1> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Promising Underclassman
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Increases <b:ATK> by <?1>.
Every 2nd EX Skill use, increases <b:CostRegen> by <?2> for 10s.

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - A Girl's Determination
Weapon.Desc:
Yukari's standard-issue Hyakkaryouran rifle.

It's her most precious possession, so she's thoroughly waterproofed it.

13014.Name: Renge (Swimsuit)
13014.ProfileIntroduction:
The Assault Squad Captain of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council, now suited up for the summer.

She's entered the Hyakkiyako Water Festival to relish her youth with her friends. Her blazing passion and competitive spirit make her a force to be reckoned with.

Ex.Name: Seaside Marksmanship
Ex.Desc:
Deals <?1> damage to one enemy.
Consumes 1 stack of <s:CH0302_Public> if available, dealing an additional <?2> damage.

Public.Name: Summer's Surging Wave
Public.Desc:

Gains 2 stacks of <s:CH0302_Public> (max. 3 stacks).

ExtraPassive.Name: Victorious Charge
ExtraPassive.Desc: When activating the EX Skill, increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1> for 16s.

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Blazing Youth
Weapon.Desc:
Renge's favorite rifle.

With a trusty companion like this, winning the festival is a sure thing.

20047.Name: Kikyou (Swimsuit)
20047.CharacterSSRNew: How did I end up at the sea...
20047.ProfileIntroduction:
The Operations Officer of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Councill, now boldly dressed for the summer.

Even though she's showing a more daring side of herself, she's still too embarrassed to admit to her friends that she can't swim. Unfortunately, she has also agreed to join them for the Hyakkiyako Water Festival.
20047.Hobby: Spinning yarn, reading military history, sunbathing

Ex.Name: Summer Catnap Technique
Ex.Desc: Deploys a hammock with Kikyou (Swimsuit) lying on it for 30s. The hammock has HP equal to a set amount plus 45.1% of Kikyou (Swimsuit)'s Max HP.

ExtraSkills.Name: Sleepy Operator
ExtraSkills.Desc: Increases the <b:CriticalChance> by <?1> and <b:CriticalDamage> by <?2> of all allies (except self) in a circular area around the hammock as long as they stay within range.

Public.Name: Operations Officer's Power Nap

ExtraPassive.Name: War of Attrition
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Keen Wisdom
Weapon.Desc:
A rifle that Kikyou is never seen without.

Even on the treacherous aquatic battlefield, she is poised for a flawless victory.

10123.Name: Seia (Swimsuit)
10123.CharacterSSRNew: Heehee. My appearance isn't the only thing that has changed.
10123.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Tea Party and the leader of Sanctus, now on a leisurely summer vacation. 

 With her capricious and impulsive nature, she's had no problem detaching herself from her Tea Party responsibilities and entering full vacation mode. While she's always been a little unpredictable, she's no longer restraining herself and is eager to let loose.

Ex.Name: Romantic Beach
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:EnhanceExDamageRate> of one ally except self by <?1> for 25s.

Public.Name: Decisive Moment
Public.Desc:
Every 12 normal attacks, restores the HP of the ally with the lowest HP (except self) by <?1> of Healing.
Restores own HP by <?2> of Healing.

ExtraPassive.Name: City Pop Star
ExtraPassive.Desc: When activating the EX Skill, increases <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1> for 26s.

Weapon.Name: Keen Illumination
Weapon.Desc:
Seia's favorite pistol.

While her outfit may be lighter, her words and bullets are as harsh as ever. Her fighting technique is as bold as her swimwear.

10124.Name: Hasumi (Swimsuit)
10124.CharacterSSRNew: Isn't this too cute for me...?
10124.ProfileIntroduction:
The vice president of the Justice Task Force who's escorting the Tea Party on their beach trip.

She's delighted to be at the beach, but is retaining her professional composure. Perhaps she's having the best time on this vacation. Thanks to her incredible self-discipline, she doesn't have to worry about how she looks in her swimsuit...probably.

Ex.Name: Pinpoint Piercing Shot
Ex.Desc: Deals <?1> damage to enemies in a fan-shaped area.

Public.Name: Zero Calorie Faith
Public.Desc:
Every 35s, increases <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> for 30s.
For each <s:CH0291_ExtraPassive> held, also increases <b:CriticalChance> by <?2> for 30s.

ExtraPassive.Name: Rewarding Myself
ExtraPassive.Desc: Every 4 times the EX Skill damages an enemy, gain 1 lasting for 43s (can stack up to 4 times). Each held increases Crit DMG by .

Weapon.Name: Impalement
Weapon.Desc:
Hasumi's favorite sniper rifle.

The always-shining barrel reflects her brilliant and vigilant mind.

26015.Name: Ichika (Swimsuit)
26015.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Justice Task Force who's trying to stay relaxed, even on the sea.

While she's known for being kind and easygoing, her patience is put to the test upon reuniting with her worst enemy. Although she doesn't intend to, the stress makes her more open with her honest feelings.
26015.Hobby: Helping others and trying new things

Ex.Name: Awakened Nature
Ex.Desc:
Decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 30s and deals <?2> damage to them.
Applies <d:ConcentratedTarget> for 30s.

Public.Name: Covering Fire
Public.Desc: Every 35s, decreases the <d:CriticalChanceResistPoint> by <?1> and <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> by <?2> of one enemy for 20s and deals <?3> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Name: Justice Operations Officer
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Red Dragon
Weapon.Desc:
Ichika and this assault rifle have been together through thick and thin.

Even though it looks unassuming on the outside, her rough treatment has left its share of dents.

20048.Name: Nagisa (Swimsuit)
20048.ProfileIntroduction:
The host of the Tea Party and the leader of Filius.

Even though she was dragged on vacation, she's unable to stop worrying about work. However, she's having fun in her own way.
20048.Hobby: Collecting tea leaves, baking pastries, gardening

Ex.Name: Teatime in Wartime
Ex.Desc: Grants <b:CostOverload> to one ally for 26s and increases their <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> for 26s.

Public.Name: Crush, Tear, Curl
Public.Desc: Every 35s, decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 27s and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Name: Lazy Ladies
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Royal Blend
Weapon.Desc:
Nagisa's favorite small pistol.

It maintains its dignified elegance even at the sandy beach.

10122.Name: Mika (Swimsuit)
10122.CharacterSSRNew: Wow. Did I keep you waiting? ☆
10122.ProfileIntroduction:
The Tea Party member who planned the beach vacation.

She started it out of consideration for her friends, but it feels like things are getting more and more complicated. Lately, she's been so stressed out that she can barely sleep.

Ex.Name: Unforgettable Memory
Ex.Desc: Activates a different EX Skill depending on what is targeted.

ExtraSkills.Name: Silent Resolve
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Immediately redraws the EX Skill and enters <s:FormChange='Rapid-fire Stance'> for 30s.
(When <s:FormChange='Rapid-fire Stance'> ends, the EX Skill is shuffled to the bottom of the deck and its cost increase is reset.)

ExtraSkills.Name: Relax a Little
ExtraSkills.Desc:
Immediately end <s:FormChange='Rapid-fire Stance'>.
(The EX Skill is shuffled to the bottom of the deck and its cost increase is reset.)

ExtraSkills.Name: Night's Falling Star
ExtraSkills.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy. While in , redraws the EX Skill immediately but increases its cost based on the number of times it has been used: 1st-2nd use: 4 COST 3rd-4th use: 6 COST 5th use onwards: 10 COST

Public.Name: Found a Pretty One!
Public.Desc: Every 40s, increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1> for 33s.

ExtraPassive.Desc:
All attacks will deal guaranteed critical damage.
Increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Quis ut Deus
Weapon.Desc:
Mika's favorite submachine gun.

Thanks to her meticulous care, it gleams brightly even at the beach.

10125.Name: Eri
10125.CharacterSSRNew: Nyuhuhu, are you in need of my magic?
10125.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of Occult Society, with a passionate interest in the study of the occult in art.

She's known for her prominent witch hat and her ability to bring magic into any conversation. She firmly believes that she can use arcane arts to improve her poor grades.

Ex.Name: Flash Arcana
Ex.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy. Increases the damage dealt by 0.5× when at 2 stacks of (resets stacks of ).

Public.Name: Spellbook's Guidance
Public.Desc: Every 35s, decreases the <d:CriticalDamageRateResist> of one enemy by <?1> for 28s, and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Name: Aspiring Artist
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Increases <b:EnhanceSonicRate> by <?1>.
When an enemy is defeated by the EX Skill while it is unenhanced, gain one stack of <s:CH0304_ExtraPassive> (max. 2 stacks).

Weapon.Name: Arcane Magic Wand
Weapon.Desc:
A rifle that Eri claims is a magic wand.

Perhaps the two are similar in that they can both shoot flames and make things disappear.

10126.Name: Kanoe
10126.CharacterSSRNew: I've been watching you...since my previous life...
10126.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Occult Society who specializes in exploring how the occult impacts art.

Despite being the only third-year in the Occult Society, she is happy supporting her other members in more of an assistant role. Due to her unusual appearance and actions, a rumor has it that she is...a bit supernatural herself.

Ex.Desc:
Grants self <b:DotHeal>, continuously restoring HP equal to <?1> every 4s for 20s.
Also removes 1 debuff.

Kanoe's favorite shotgun.

It fires rounds by creating a chemical reaction via alchemy...or so she claims.

20049.Name: Misaki (Swimsuit)
20049.CharacterSSRNew: So this is the summer ocean...
20049.ProfileIntroduction:
The seemingly calm and collected member of the Arius Squad.

She's trying her best to appear nonchalant, but she can't fully hide her excitement. She'll become angry if you bring it up, however.

Weapon.Desc:
Misaki's portable missile.


Since it's summer, she might be able to find another exciting use for it.

10127.Name: Miyo
10127.CharacterSSRNew: Could I...also become a romance novel writer?
10127.ProfileIntroduction:
An art student from Wildhunt Art Academy.

She is the president of the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club. Although her ultimate goal is the dissolution of the Free Trade Cartel, that day is likely very, very far off. Her shy personality tends to be dwarfed by her over-the-top club members who never do things halfway.

Weapon.Desc: A rifle that Miyo always carries around, but rarely gathers the nerve to actually use. Instead, she uses it as a means to engrave text she calls "bullet marks."

10128.Name: Fuyu
10128.CharacterSSRNew: Anything in particular you're looking for?
10128.ProfileIntroduction:
Sales Manager for the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club.

She works as the face of the Free Trade Cartel, receiving orders and meeting with their clients. Although she always acts confident and composed, she actually breaks down quite quickly if a plan starts to go awry.

Ex.Desc: Decreases the <d:DEF> of one enemy by <?1> for 22s and deals <?2> damage to them.

Weapon.Desc:
A suspicious machine pistol from an unknown manufacturer that Fuyu uses.

It doesn't take long for a client to agree with whatever Fuyu is saying whenever she pulls this out.

20050.Name: Ritsu
20050.ProfileIntroduction:
Manager of practical activities for the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club.

She's the muscle of the Free Trade Cartel and the person who grew the club into what it is today. Despite this, she's laid-back and just wants to enjoy club activities with her friends.

Ex.Name: Let's Eat Together!
Ex.Desc: Increases the <b:AttackSpeed> of one ally by <?1> for 24s.

Public.Desc: Every 200 times a critical hit is landed by allies, decreases the <d:DEF> of one enemy by <?1> for 21s and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Name: Art Liberation
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Portable Drilling Machine
Weapon.Desc:
An SMG that Ritsu always carries with her.

She'll sometimes press its muzzle against a rock and pull the trigger to break up the stone.

20051.Name: Reisa (Magical)
20051.CharacterSSRNew: Magical Vigilante Crew! Cue flashy entrance!
20051.ProfileIntroduction:
Reisa changed into a magical girl costume for a Vigilante Crew infiltration mission.

Considering that she's been a fan of magical girls since she was a young girl, this is a dream come true for her.

Ex.Name: Thermite Pink is Here!
Ex.Desc:
Reisa (Magical) transforms and appears on the field as Thermite Pink.
Thermite Pink inherits <?1> of Reisa (Magical)'s <b:MAXHP>, <?2> of her <b:ATK> and <?3> of her <b:HealPower> and lasts 22s.

Public.Desc: When using the EX Skill with 5 stacks of <s:CH0326_Public>, consumes all stacks to enhance the EX Skill, improving the Passive Skill of the summoned Thermite Pink to also increase allies' <b:CriticalDamage> by <?1> while they stay within range.

ExtraPassive.Name: Firepower is Magic!
ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: Shooting☆Star
Weapon.Desc:
Reisa's precious shotgun.

She claims that it's a magic wand because it comes with light, sound, and firepower.

10129.Name: Suzumi (Magical)
10129.CharacterSSRNew: S-Sensei...! Dressing like this isn't a hobby of mine!
10129.ProfileIntroduction:
The Vigilante Crew goes on an infiltration mission, and Suzumi ends up putting on a magical girl costume.

Although she doesn't know much about magical girls, and can't stand attracting attention, she's persevering for the sake of justice.

Public.Desc: Every 35s, decreases the <d:Dodge> of one enemy by <?1> for 27s and deals <?2> damage to them.

ExtraPassive.Desc: When using the EX Skill, increases <b:CostRegen> by <?1> for 35s.

Weapon.Desc:
Suzumi's assault rifle.

Her firearm is well-known to criminals trying to escape justice, so she decorated it for this infiltration mission.

16018.Name: Rabu
16018.ProfileIntroduction:
Captain of the Splash Helmet Gang.

She's a leader her subordinates fully and completely trust. In reciprocation, she tries all sorts of things to improve their lives, but she seems to be Lady Unluck.

Up to 3 Helmet Gangsters can be summoned at a time. SG: of Rabu's and of her . AR: of Rabu's and of her . SR: of Rabu's and of her .

Weapon.Desc:
Rabu's shotgun.

It's worn out from time, and being swung around like a baseball bat, but it's neatly maintained.

10130.Name: Subaru
10130.ProfileIntroduction:
Leader of the remaining students at Arius Satellite School.

People trust both her leadership and character wholeheartedly. Her "kids" regard her as kind and nurturing, a caring authority figure in their lives. However, in the event that she feels their safety is threatened, she's quick to flip her switch.

Weapon.Desc:
Subaru's assault rifle.

Subaru made meticulous modifications to it for both its functionality and symbolism. While it may seem bland from another's perspective, for her, it's the representation of her resolve.

10131.Name: Takane
10131.CharacterSSRNew: I hope you've been well. I have a work I'd like to recommend to you, what do you say?
10131.ProfileIntroduction:
A member of the Publishing Department, the Red Winter Academy's publishing club.

On the surface, she values etiquette and speaks in a refined manner. She's also a skilled critic, although her subjective opinions sometimes lead her into unintended conflicts. She's in an odd rivalry with the Knowledge Liberation Front.

Ex.Name: Critic's Consideration
Ex.Desc: Restores the HP of one ally except self by <?1> of Healing. Also restores own HP by <?2> of Healing and gains <s:CH0229_Ex> for 30s.

Weapon.Desc:
A pistol that Takane customized according to her taste.

While it functions well as a pistol, it also provides an excellent outlet for her rage.

20052.Name: Yakumo
20052.CharacterSSRNew:
By any chance, are you interested in books?
Eh, let's just have a talk.
20052.ProfileIntroduction:
The president of the Publishing Department, the Red Winter Academy's publishing club.

She also serves as Chief Editor for the "Red Bear" magazine. She's unstoppable once she sets her mind on something, and this invincible president will do anything for the Publishing Department's profit. But she also seems to be hiding a pure heart lying beneath her cunning exterior...
20052.Hobby: Writing business proposals, analyzing railroad lines

Ex.Name: Publish, Print, Distribute
Ex.Desc:
Repositions up to 5 enemies in a circular area to the selected location and decreases their <d:MoveSpeed> by <?1> for 13s. For every enemy affected, gain one stack of <s:CH0228_Ex> (max. 4 stacks).
Additionally has a <?2> chance of inflicting <c:Stunned> for <?3>.

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Desc:
A pistol that Yakumo keeps on hand

She often says that there are many uses for a gun. One of them is encouraging "diligence" in writers who are at risk of missing their deadlines.

10132.Name: Tsukuyo (Dress)
10132.CharacterSSRNew: わ、私が本当にモデルを……？
10132.ProfileIntroduction:
百鬼夜行連合学院所属、忍術研究部の部員。

ファッションショーの警備員として雇われたものの、モデルとしてデビューすることに。コンプレックスだった身長がモデル業界では大きな強みとなった。本人としてはモデルと部活の両立に悩んでいる模様。
10132.Hobby: 身代わりの術、息を潜めること

Ex.Name: 忍者は、退かないもの、です！
Ex.Desc:
Repositions to the selected location, creating cover for Tsukuyo (Dress) and granting her covered status for 40s.
The cover has HP equal to <?1> of Tsukuyo (Dress)'s Max HP and has the same defense type as Tsukuyo (Dress).
Increases <b:AttackSpeed> by <?2> for 30s.

While protected by a <b:Shield>, gains <b:NinjaWalking>.
<b:NinjaWalking> continuously restores HP equal to <?1> of Healing every 4s.

Weapon.Name: ツクヨ流サブマシンガン
Weapon.Desc:
ツクヨが大事にしているサブマシンガン。

舞台上に持っていく時も特別飾ったりはしていない。以前、ミチルとイズナに飾りつけてもらった姿が、ツクヨにとって最高の状態だからなのだろう。

20053.Name: Michiru (Dress)
20053.CharacterSSRNew:
潜入任務も忍者の花形、ってね！
ドレス姿でいざ参らん！
20053.ProfileIntroduction:
百鬼夜行連合学院所属、忍術研究部の部長。

ファッションショーの潜入警備員として雇われ、ドレスに袖を通すことに。色々と初めての経験が多い中、忍者らしくどうあるかを考えている模様。
20053.Hobby: 新しい忍術の考案、動画作り

Ex.Name: 少女忍法帖、ミチうにゃああっ！

Passive.Name: これもまた忍者装束也！

WeaponPassive.Name: これもまた忍者装束也！+

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:CostRegen> by <?1>.

Weapon.Name: ミチル流オーバーフローショットガン
Weapon.Desc:
ミチルが愛用しているショットガン。

なんだか今回は、持ち主と同じく少しお淑やかになっている模様。

10133.Name: Rio (Armed)
10133.CharacterSSRNew:
電子戦なら任せてちょうだい。
最も合理的な解を見せてあげる。
10133.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、生徒会「セミナー」の会長。

未曾有の危機に対応すべく特殊スーツを身に纏った。後方支援から現場対応まで可能な合理を追求したスーツとなっている。

特殊スーツのサポート性能によって、より正確な射撃が可能となった模様。

16019.Name: Toki (Armed)
16019.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、C&Cのエージェント兼、特異現象捜査部の現場担当。

偵察任務のために着替えた姿。本人曰く、「機動力に優れた新生・飛鳥馬トキ」とのこと。また、仮ではあるが趣味を見つけることができた模様。

20054.Name: Himari (Armed)
20054.CharacterSSRNew:
超天才清楚系病弱美少女のやることは変わりません。
優雅に冷静に、一つずつ対処しましょうか。
20054.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ハッカー集団「ヴェリタス」の元部長で、現特異現象捜査部の部長。

未曾有の危機に対応すべく、特殊スーツを身に纏った。また、新たな「車椅子」のおかげで、縦横無尽に駆けることが可能となった模様。

20054.Hobby: 今日の運勢の確認、オカルト全般

10134.Name: Aris (Armed)
10134.CharacterSSRNew: アリス、もっと世界を見てみたいです！
10134.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ゲーム開発部の部員。

ゲームが大好きで、少し変わったところのある少女。今は世界の運命を背負っている。

ExtraSkills.Name: Awakening: Supernova
ExtraSkills.Desc: Deals damage to one enemy and damage to enemies in a straight line towards the target. Damage is multiplied by 2× when at or 3× when at . Resets after use.

ExtraSkills.Name: Sword of Light
ExtraSkills.Desc: Immediately redraws the EX Skill and increases <s:EnergyBatteryEmpty> level by 1 (maximum level is 2).

Public.Desc: When running out of ammo, immediately reloads and deals <?1> damage to one enemy.

ExtraPassive.Name: Type: Abi-Eshuh
ExtraPassive.Desc:
Unleashes full potential, changing all damage dealt to be considered as EX Skill damage.
Increases <b:DamageRatio> by <?1> and <b:EnhanceExDamageRate> by <?2>.

Weapon.Name: 光の剣：スーパーノヴァ for アビ・エシュフ
Weapon.Desc:
レールガンを軽量化し、連続射撃が可能なようにカスタマイズされたアサルトライフル。

伝説の剣を手にすることで、少女は勇者となった。そう、アリスの冒険もここから始まったのだ。

10135.Name: Kei
10135.CharacterSSRNew:
な、なんですか……？
何かあるなら言ってくださいよ！
10135.ProfileIntroduction:
新たな身体となったケイ。

普段よりもややテンションが高くなっているが、本人は自覚していない模様。
10135.ProfileIntroductionChange:
自身を自身として定義したケイ。

人工知能からAMASへ、欠陥がある生贄から今の身体へ。紆余曲折を経てここにいる。

ミレニアムサイエンススクールは部活動の掛け持ちが可能な学園のため、特異現象捜査部所属ではあるものの、ゲーム開発部にいることが多い。

事実上、ゲーム開発部の新任プロデューサーをしているが……本人は否定している模様。
10135.Hobby: アリスのお世話、おしゃれ、ゲーム（本人は否定）

Ex.Name: Here I Am
Ex.Desc: Deploys an amplifier for 25s, increasing the <b:ATK> by <?1> and <b:EnhanceMysticRate> by <?2> of allies in a circular area around it while they stay within range.

Public.Desc:
When the amplifier's duration ends, deals <?1> damage to one enemy.
Also deals <?2> of the damage accumulated by the amplifier. (This damage cannot be critical and is unaffected by Kei's attributes.)

While the amplifier is deployed, 10% of the damage dealt to enemies by allies other than Kei that are in the amplifier's range is accumulated, up to a maximum of 5000% of Kei's base ATK. (Accumulated damage is reset each time the amplifier is deployed.)

Weapon.Name: ルミナス・ノヴァ
Weapon.Desc:
ケイ専用のレールガン。

新たな一歩を踏み出した彼女に相応しい逸品となっている。

10136.Name: Eimi (Armed)
10136.CharacterSSRNew: 和泉元エイミ、現場から報告。
10136.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、特異現象捜査部のスペシャリスト。

マークスマンとして後方支援をすべく着替えている。できるだけ肌の露出を抑えた方が支援に適していると思ったものの……暑さに耐えられなかったのか、ケープを脱いで腰に巻いている。

トキと同様メインの武器をエネルギーライフルに変更した。狙撃サポート用のバイザーを装着しているため、バックパックもトキのものより遥かに大型のものとなっているのだとか。
10136.Hobby: ボーっとすること、音楽鑑賞

Ex.Name: On-site Designated Sniper
Ex.Desc:
Immediately reloads and enters Precision Targeting Mode, increasing <s:FormChange> damage to <?1> and applying <s:CH0337_Ex> to one enemy. (Precision Targeting Mode ends after 30s or after activating the Basic Skill.)
Eimi (Armed) prioritizes attacking enemies with <s:CH0337_Ex>.

Public.Desc: After 4 normal attacks while in Precision Targeting Mode, consume all remaining ammo to deal <?1> guaranteed critical damage to one enemy.

However, the damage dealt by Enhanced Normal Attacks and the Basic Skill increases by up to 2.4× in proportion to <b:AttackSpeed> buffs. (Max. multiplier is applied when the increase in <b:AttackSpeed> reaches 150%.)

Weapon.Desc:
新しく作られたエイミのエネルギーライフル。

後方支援のために用意された、スペシャリスト用の武器だ。

20055.Name: Yuzu (Armed)
20055.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ゲーム開発部の部長。

未曾有の事態に備えて、特殊スーツに身を包んでいる。スーツの仕様はリオの強い要望によって決まったのだとか。当の本人は穴があったら入りたいほど恥ずかしがっている模様。

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:ATK> by <?1>.

Weapon.Desc:
ユズが普段から携帯しているグレネードランチャー。

色々なことが変わったけれど、これだけはずっと変わらない。

20056.Name: Koyuki (Pajamas)
20056.CharacterSSRNew: 行動が先、細かいことは後回し！
20056.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、生徒会「セミナー」のトラブルメーカーな天才少女。

パジャマはユウカからプレゼントされたもの。着替えたとしても黒崎コユキは変わらない。いつも通り反省部屋から抜け出し、自由気ままに振る舞っている模様。

WeaponPassive.Name: The Art of Staying Up All Night+

ExtraPassive.Desc: Increases all allies' <b:AttackSpeed> by <?1>.

Weapon.Desc:
コユキと共にあらゆる苦難を乗り越えてきたマシンガン。

トラブルを起こす持ち主とは違い、淡々と補佐してくれる頼もしい相棒……実は何も考えてないだけかもしれない。

10137.Name: Konoka
10137.CharacterSSRNew: ちわーっす、おなしゃーす！
10137.ProfileIntroduction:
ヴァルキューレ警察学校所属、公安局の副局長。

風貌から容疑者と勘違いされることもあるが、有能な警官。犯罪者の心理や行動を公安局の誰よりも上手くトレースできるが、意識してやっているようには見えない。

公安局で最も昇進したことが多く、最も降格されたことの多い生徒でもあるのだとか。
10137.Hobby: マッサージチェアを使うこと、新聞のクロスワードパズルを解くこと

10138.Name: Rena
10138.CharacterSSRNew: キヴォトス最高のファッションデザイナーになってやるんだから！
10138.ProfileIntroduction:
ワイルドハント芸術学院所属、芸術に宿るオカルトを研究するオカルト研究会のメンバー。

偶然にも第4棟404号室に割り当てられたことから、オカルト研究会の活動をする羽目になった。オカルトはインチキだと主張しているが、知らず知らずのうちに本人もオカルトに染まっている模様。

自身でカスタムした可愛いデザインだが、当たると痛いのは他の銃と同じだ。

20057.Name: Akane (School)
20057.CharacterSSRNew: よろしければ、一緒にミレニアムを散策しませんか？
20057.ProfileIntroduction:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ミレニアムEXPOのガイドを務めることになった「C&C」のエージェント。

潜入作戦のために制服に着替えているのだとか。メイドやエージェントでなく、普通の生徒として行動できるようになったことで、より一層穏やかな空気を纏っている。

だが、「お掃除」のやり方を忘れたわけではない模様。

彼女に「静か」にしてもらいたいなら、無駄な行動は控えたほうが良いだろう。

10139.Name: Niko
10139.CharacterSSRNew: FOX2、補給の準備が整いました。
10139.ProfileIntroduction:
SRT特殊学園所属、FOX小隊の副小隊長。コールサイン「FOX2」。

優しく穏やかな性格で、誰とでもすぐに打ち解けられる。そのため、SRT学園では小隊を越えて彼女を頼る後輩が多い。潜入や偽装工作が得意で、小隊の管理運営を兼任している。

特技はいなり寿司を作ること。小隊員の弁当としてよく作っているが、非常に味が良いのでSRT学園内でも好評を得ている。

10140.ProfileIntroduction:

優れた身体能力を持ち、現場対応力が高い。戦闘に特化したポイントマン。感情の起伏が激しく、真っ直ぐな性格だが、それが功を奏して作戦を乗り越えられたことは数しれず。

あまり口にしていないが、自身の体型にコンプレックスを抱えている。

軽量で高い安定性を持ち、盾との併用が可能。
他のサブマシンガンと比べて消音性が高いため、裏で敵を処理するのにも適している。

16020.ProfileIntroduction:
SRT特殊学園所属、FOX小隊のスナイパー。コールサイン「FOX4」。

一匹狼が多いスナイパーの中で、初対面ともすぐに打ち解けられる稀有な存在。小隊ではムードメーカー的なポジション。
戦場では敵士気を下げる役割も果たしている。

電子機器の扱いが得意で、一般的な設備程度であれば修理もできるのだとか。

高い貫通力で遮蔽物に隠れた相手を狙撃できる。また、弾速の速さを活かした超長距離の狙撃も可能。しかし非常に重いという欠点があり、オトギは肩凝りに悩まされているとか。
